reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper ini secara eksplisit mengintegrasikan 'Bidirectional Mamba Block for temporal modeling' pada EEG neonatal untuk klasifikasi sleep stage. Frasa 'for temporal modeling' menunjukkan Mamba adalah komponen utama untuk dependensi sekuensial/inter-stage. Hybrid CNN+Mamba ini identik dengan Anchor 6 (Zhou et al. 2025, Neonatal EEG). Metrik kuantitatif jelas dilaporkan (akurasi 0.877, macro F1 0.868). Memenuhi semua kriteria P-I-O-S.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Arsitektur ini adalah hybrid MRCNN+Mamba. Meskipun CNN melakukan ekstraksi fitur hierarkis, Mamba secara eksplisit dinyatakan sebagai 'Bidirectional Mamba Block for temporal modeling' — berperan sebagai komponen utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal antar-stage. Ini sejajar dengan Anchor 6. Namun, peran relatif Mamba vs CNN dalam pipeline keseluruhan sulit dinilai tanpa full-text (apakah Mamba hanya lapisan kecil setelah CNN, atau memang backbone sekuensial utama yang menentukan performa). Ada risiko bahwa CNN-lah yang dominan dan Mamba hanya penambah kecil.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Enhancing Neonatal Sleep Analysis with Multi-resolution CNN and Mamba Integration*

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Temporal features are extracted by stacked MAMBA-based blocks capturing long-range dependencies.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Secara eksplisit menggunakan 'stacked MAMBA-based blocks' sebagai komponen utama untuk mengekstrak fitur temporal dengan 'long-range dependencies' — ini jelas merupakan peran backbone sekuensial sesuai definisi operasional. Transformer experts berperan di tahap fusion (MoE-GRU) dan tidak menggantikan fungsi sekuensial Mamba. Sama seperti Anchor 6 (Zhou et al. 2025 — CNN+Mamba untuk temporal modeling), hybrid ini memenuhi kriteria INCLUDE karena Mamba adalah modul utama untuk dependensi temporal. P: EEG untuk emotion recognition via AI ✅; I: Mamba sebagai core sequential ✅; O: 'state-of-the-art results' pada DEAP dan MAHNOBHCI ✅; S: riset orisinal, Inggris ✅.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Arsitektur ini hybrid: Mamba untuk temporal feature extraction NAMUN juga menggunakan 'specialized Transformer experts' dalam MoE-GRU module. Jika Transformer experts melakukan pemrosesan sekuensial yang signifikan dan Mamba hanya sebagai feature extractor awal, maka peran Mamba sebagai 'backbone utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal' bisa dipertanyakan. Namun, frasa 'stacked MAMBA-based blocks capturing long-range dependencies' cukup kuat menunjukkan Mamba sebagai core sequential model. Masih ada ambiguitas tentang bobot relatif antara Mamba dan Transformer experts dalam pipeline.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: CMGNN: Cross-Modal Emotion Recognition via EEG-Face Alignment and Expert-Guided Fusion

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Time and frequency domain features are introduced for the classification of sleep disorders using machine learning classifiers such as Random Forest, multilayer perceptron (MLP) and so on.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: MLP可视为神经网络，但摘要未明确其深度学习属性，且未使用现代SSM作为主干，仍不满足干预条件。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 论文使用传统机器学习分类器（Random Forest、MLP）和手工特征，没有涉及任何现代深度学习架构或SSM，因此直接排除。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A Machine Learning Approach for the Classification of Sleep Disorders Using Time and Frequency Domain Features of a Single Channel EEG Signal

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Neural-SSM, a novel computational model based on the State Space Model (SSM), designed to effectively capture and characterize neural activity patterns... the Embedding Unit achieved an accuracy of 81.41% in classifying N-back task difficulty, while the Attention GRU component demonstrated precise regression of hemodynamic responses with a mean squared error (MSE) of 0.1289.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE. Istilah 'Neural-SSM, a novel computational model based on the State Space Model' mengimplikasikan arsitektur deep learning berbasis SSM. Model ini dilatih pada data EEG/fNIRS untuk klasifikasi N-back, melaporkan akurasi 81.41% dan MSE 0.1289. Meskipun ada komponen GRU, SSM mungkin berperan sebagai pemodel sekuensial utama — perlu verifikasi full-text.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Judul dan abstrak hanya menggunakan istilah generik 'State Space Model (SSM)' tanpa menyebutkan varian Modern SSM (S4, Mamba, H3, Hyena, S5, DSS). Komponen 'Attention GRU' menunjukkan arsitektur ini kemungkinan besar mengandalkan GRU (RNN) sebagai pemodel temporal utama, sedangkan 'SSM' bisa jadi hanya referensi ke SSM klasik atau modul kecil. Tidak cukup bukti bahwa SSM modern adalah backbone utama.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Multimodal Brain Signal Analysis with State-Space Modeling: A Study on Working Memory

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The algorithm first introduces the structured state space sequence model to capture the long-term dependencies of epileptic EEG... Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm effectively retains patterns of seizure region and exhibits strong performance for cross-subject seizure detection.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Jelas memenuhi semua kriteria. P: EEG untuk deteksi kejang (klasifikasi berbasis AI). I: 'structured state space sequence model to capture the long-term dependencies of epileptic EEG' = Modern SSM sebagai backbone utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal. O: 'Experimental results demonstrate strong performance for cross-subject seizure detection' = evaluasi kuantitatif pada tugas dekoding. S: Riset orisinal, topik SSM modern menunjukkan publikasi era 2021+, berbahasa Inggris. Tidak ada keraguan berarti.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Sedikit keraguan pada Q4: frasa 'structured state space sequence model' tidak menyebutkan varian spesifik (S4, Mamba, dll.), sehingga secara strict bisa diinterpretasikan sebagai SSM klasik. Namun, terminologi ini adalah kanonik untuk Modern SSM dan digunakan untuk 'capture the long-term dependencies' = peran sebagai backbone sekuensial utama. Untuk Q5: frasa 'strong performance' tidak eksplisit menyebut metrik kuantitatif spesifik, namun 'Experimental results demonstrate' sangat mengimplikasikan evaluasi numerik ada. Secara strict, sedikit ambiguity pada dua poin tersebut tetapi bukti condong kuat ke INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Mutual Information Driven Representation Learning for Cross-Subject Seizure Detection

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose a Deep Riemannian State-Space Model (DRSSM) that characterizes the temporal evolution of functional connectivity (FC) on the manifold of symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices... A Riemannian state-evolved network then models FC trajectories within geometric constraints. Evaluated on five fMRI datasets of Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease, DRSSM outperforms baseline methods in identifying dynamic FC patterns.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: DRSSM secara eksplisit menyebut 'Deep State-Space Model' yang menggunakan parameterisasi ruang keadaan kontinu (state-evolved network) dan memiliki komponen deep learning (attention-based fusion, feature distillation network). Dapat diinterpretasikan sebagai varian modern SSM yang diperluas ke domain non-Euclidean (Riemannian manifold). Evaluasi pada 5 dataset fMRI penyakit Alzheimer dan Parkinson menunjukkan outperforming baseline, mengimplikasikan metrik kuantitatif. Kriteria P (fMRI, kondisi neurologis), I (deep state-space model), O (kuantitatif tersirat), S (orisinal, post-2021, Inggris) → berpotensi INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: DRSSM adalah model state-space klasik yang diperkaya deep learning pada manifold Riemannian (SPD matrices), bukan arsitektur Modern SSM seperti S4/Mamba/H3/Hyena. 'State-space' di sini merujuk pada kerangka matematis untuk memodelkan dinamika brain state, bukan arsitektur sequence modeling efisien dengan parameterisasi kontinu khas Modern SSM (HiPPO, selective scan, dll.). Klasifikasi sebagai 'DNN approximation yang tidak berbasis arsitektur SSM modern' → EXCLUDE (I-NOMATCH). Selain itu, tujuan utama adalah 'understanding brain functional dynamics' dan 'identifying dynamic FC patterns' — lebih deskriptif/interpretatif daripada dekoding/klasifikasi kondisi neurologis secara eksplisit → berpotensi EXCLUDE (P-NOMATCH/O-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Understanding Brain Functional Dynamics With Deep State-Space Modeling on Riemannian Manifold

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We find that HBO2 data [...] have significant correlations and logistic relationships with high visual product aesthetic quality [...] the overall prediction accuracy of the model to evaluate products' aesthetic quality is 84.1%. — Model berbasis hubungan logistik/statistik, bukan deep learning.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun fNIRS memenuhi kriteria P (data otak untuk prediksi berbasis AI) dan metrik kuantitatif (84.1% akurasi) memenuhi O, frasa kunci 'correlations and logistic relationships' secara eksplisit menunjukkan pendekatan statistik tradisional (logistic regression), bukan deep learning. Tidak ada ambiguitas yang memerlukan full-text — bahasa abstrak sangat jelas mengarah ke metode non-deep-learning. EXCLUDE di Q3.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Abstract menggambarkan studi korelasi/analisis asosiasi antara fNIRS dan estetika produk dengan model evaluasi berbasis hubungan logistik ('logistic relationships') dan korelasi statistik. Tidak ada sebutan deep learning, neural network, atau arsitektur Modern SSM apapun. Model yang digunakan kemungkinan besar regresi logistik klasik, bukan deep learning. EXCLUDE di Q3 (I-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Research on the Association Mechanism and Evaluation Model Between fNIRS Data and Aesthetic Quality in Product Aesthetic Quality Evaluation

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: A DPF estimation method combining a state-space model of the modified Beer-Lambert law (mBLL), a parameter model for estimating the reduced scattering coefficients, and dual square-root cubature Kalman filters (SCKFs) is proposed. The results show that the estimated DPFs showed relative errors less than 1.33% maximum.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun judul dan abstract mengandung istilah 'state-space model' dan fNIRS adalah modalitas brain imaging, dua hal mendasar membuat paper ini tetap di-exclude: (1) 'state-space model' di sini merujuk pada formulasi matematis hukum Beer-Lambert yang dimodifikasi dengan Kalman Filter klasik (SCKF), sama sekali bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM; (2) tujuan studi adalah estimasi DPF untuk kalibrasi fNIRS, bukan decoding/prediction/classification niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis berbasis model AI. Tidak ada satu pun kriteria yang terpenuhi.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini menggunakan 'state-space model' dan 'dual square-root cubature Kalman filters (SCKFs)' untuk estimasi Differential Pathlength Factor (DPF) pada fNIRS — ini adalah state-space model klasik/Kalman Filter tradisional, bukan arsitektur Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Selain itu, fokus studi adalah kalibrasi/signal processing fNIRS, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. Gagal pada Q3 (bukan deep learning) sekaligus Q2 (bukan tujuan dekoding AI).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Multi-Channel-Based Differential Pathlength Factor Estimation for Continuous-Wave fNIRS

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: BRAINMAP (Mamba-Aided Prediction) 'leverages Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in conjunction with a hybrid approach that integrates an attention mechanism and the Mamba block to effectively capture spatiotemporal features for functional MR images' and 'outperformed existing state-of-the-art dynamic FC models in ADHD detection, achieving improvements ranging from 3% to 12% across the three datasets' using fMRI data (ADHD-200, UCLA, CNI-TLC).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Model secara eksplisit bernama 'Mamba-Aided Prediction' dan abstract menyatakan hybrid approach 'integrates an attention mechanism and the Mamba block to effectively capture spatiotemporal features.' Frasa 'spatiotemporal features' mengimplikasikan Mamba berperan signifikan dalam pemodelan dependensi temporal, sejajar dengan Anchor 6 (Zhou et al. - CNN+Mamba for temporal modeling). Pemenuhan P (fMRI untuk diagnosis ADHD), O (peningkatan 3-12% pada 3 dataset), dan S (orisinal, Inggris) jelas.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Mamba digunakan dalam pendekatan hibrida bersama GNN dan attention mechanism. Abstract menyebut 'integrates an attention mechanism and the Mamba block' tetapi tidak secara eksplisit menjelaskan apakah Mamba adalah backbone sekuensial utama atau hanya modul tambahan di antara komponen-komponen lain (GNN + attention). Peran Mamba bisa jadi minor sehingga berpotensi EXCLUDE (I-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Encoding and Decoding of Brain Dynamic Functional Connectivity for ADHD Diagnosis

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose a new switching state space model called latent dynamical coherence model or briefly LDCM... demonstrate an application of our model in characterizing circuit dynamics of the anesthetic state — ini adalah SSM klasik (statistical), bukan Modern SSM/deep learning, dan tujuannya karakterisasi, bukan decoding kuantitatif.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Bahkan dengan interpretasi paling liberal, paper ini tetap sulit di-include. Meskipun menggunakan EEG dan state-space model, LDCM adalah model statistik klasik yang secara eksplisit disebutkan dalam briefing sebagai EXCLUDE ('State-Space Model Klasik'). Tidak ada indikasi penggunaan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM. Studi ini bersifat deskriptif/karakterisatif ('characterize circuit dynamics') tanpa output prediksi/dekoding kuantitatif. Satusatunya argumen liberal mungkin memerlukan full-text untuk memastikan tidak ada komponen deep learning tersembunyi, tetapi berdasarkan abstrak, probabilitasnya sangat rendah.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Jelas EXCLUDE. Paper ini mengusulkan 'switching state space model' (LDCM) yang merupakan model statistik klasik (serupa Hidden Markov Model / Kalman Filter switching), bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Tujuannya adalah karakterisasi dinamika ritmik jaringan otak, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. Tidak ada metrik kuantitatif dekoding (Akurasi, AUC, RMSE) yang dilaporkan. Gagal di Q3 (bukan deep learning), Q2 (karakterisasi, bukan AI decoding), dan Q5 (tanpa metrik kuantitatif).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Latent Dynamical Model to Characterize Brain Network-Level Rhythmic Dynamics

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Three important classifiers, namely, Random Forest, KNN, and SVM, have been used for this work.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: 即使放宽标准，论文仍聚焦于传统机器学习，未涉及任何深度学习或SSM组件，排除理由充分。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 论文使用传统机器学习（Random Forest, KNN, SVM）而非深度学习，完全不符合现代SSM干预标准，应立即排除。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: AutoSleepNet: A Multi-Signal Framework for Automated Sleep Stage Classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: By incorporating a Mamba module within our attention fusion framework, we significantly improve classification accuracy and enhance interpretability for clinical applications.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Liberal reading: Mamba is explicitly highlighted as a key contributor to improved accuracy and interpretability, suggesting it plays a substantive role in the architecture. For fMRI data (inherently sequential/temporal), Mamba could be serving as the primary module for modeling temporal dependencies within the fusion framework. The tri-modal fusion context with sequential neuroimaging data is exactly where a Modern SSM would serve as a core temporal backbone. This could satisfy the inclusion criteria if Mamba's role is indeed as the main sequential modeler.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Strict reading: Paper states 'incorporating a Mamba module within our attention fusion framework' — this phrasing positions Mamba as a module within an attention-based architecture, not as the backbone for sequential/temporal modeling. The dominant mechanism appears to be the attention fusion framework, with Mamba potentially serving as a smaller auxiliary component. If Mamba is merely a layer or sub-module within the attention fusion pipeline (not the core temporal modeler), this falls under EXCLUDE per I-NOMATCH (Modern SSM as small module/regularizer).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MMAFN: Multi-Modal Attention Fusion Network for Attention-Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder Classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: a temporal context module based on Mamba was developed to efficiently capture contextual information across signals; SynthSleepNet achieved superior performance ... with accuracies of 89.89%, 99.75%, and 89.60%
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Pertimbangan liberal: Mengandung data EEG yang memenuhi kriteria populasi; Mamba digunakan sebagai modul untuk pemodelan temporal yang efisien, sesuai definisi intervensi; melaporkan metrik akurasi kuantitatif; diasumsikan riset orisinal terbaru berbahasa Inggris.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Pertimbangan strict: Data melibatkan sinyal non-otak (EOG, EMG, ECG) sehingga populasinya tidak murni data aktivitas otak; peran Mamba sebagai 'temporal context module' mungkin hanya modul kecil, bukan backbone utama; tanggal publikasi tidak jelas.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Toward Foundational Model for Sleep Analysis Using a Multimodal Hybrid-Self-Supervised Learning Framework

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The cross-sectional observational study was conducted on a clinical cohort of 357 adults... who underwent simultaneous gold-standard PSG and the multimodal ANNE One wearable system (ECG, PPG, accelerometry) recording. These results validate the EEG-less multimodal system as a scalable solution for objective sleep monitoring.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun paper menggunakan Mamba-based model dan mengevaluasi sleep staging secara kuantitatif (akurasi 65.11%, κ=53.23%), sinyal input (ECG, PPG, akselerometri) adalah sinyal perifer kardiovaskular dan gerakan, bukan sinyal aktivitas otak. Definisi operasional P secara tegas membatasi pada data biologis aktivitas otak. Tidak ada celah untuk memasukkan studi ini.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Data yang digunakan adalah ECG, PPG, dan akselerometri dari sistem wearable ANNE One — semuanya merupakan sinyal fisiologis perifer non-otak. Paper secara eksplisit menyebut 'EEG-less multimodal system'. Tidak ada data aktivitas otak (EEG/fMRI/fNIRS/ECoG/spiking) yang digunakan, sehingga gagal memenuhi kriteria P.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Sleep Pattern Analysis for Elderly Using Wearables

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: This topical review provides a systematical overview of state-of-the-art methods for decoding pain from brain signals...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE — Meskipun topiknya relevan dengan decoding otak, dokumen ini adalah review ('topical review') yang tidak melaporkan implementasi model atau metrik kuantitatif original. Tidak memenuhi definisi studi riset orisinal.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE — Paper ini secara eksplisit menyatakan 'This topical review provides a systematical overview...', menjadikannya review paper, bukan studi riset orisinal. Gagal pada kriteria S (Study Design). Tidak perlu lanjut ke pengecekan P/I/O.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Decoding pain from brain activity.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 摘要中提及'Linear parametric state-space models'和'switching state-space models'，并使用变分近似和期望最大化算法进行推断，无任何现代SSM或深度学习架构的提及。
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: 状态空间模型是广义概念，但现代SSM特指基于神经网络架构如S4/Mamba的变体。摘要未提及任何深度学习组件，仅涉及传统统计建模，因此应排除。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 摘要明确描述基于线性参数状态空间模型和切换状态空间模型，这是经典方法（非深度学习），不符合干预标准（I-NOMATCH）。直接排除。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Switching state-space modeling of neural signal dynamics.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: we employ Mamba encoder as the backbone of EEGMamba to model the spatiotemporal dependencies among EEG patches. ... EEGMamba achieves the state-of-the-art performance across all the tasks.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE tanpa ambiguitas. Paper ini merupakan contoh klasik yang memenuhi semua kriteria: P (EEG data untuk BCI), I (Mamba sebagai backbone utama untuk spatiotemporal modeling), O (SOTA performance across all tasks - metrik kuantitatif), S (orisinal, era Mamba, Inggris). Model bernama 'EEGMamba' dengan pre-training pada 16,724 jam data EEG dari 5 dataset.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE. Mamba secara eksplisit digunakan sebagai backbone utama ('we employ Mamba encoder as the backbone of EEGMamba to model the spatiotemporal dependencies among EEG patches'). Meskipun berupa foundation model (pre-training + fine-tuning), inti arsitektur adalah Mamba untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal/spasial EEG. Evaluasi pada 6 downstream BCI tasks dengan hasil SOTA memenuhi O. Tidak ada alasan untuk EXCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: EEGMamba: An EEG foundation model with Mamba.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We design the eMamba block for extracting EEG features based on the principles of state space models (SSMs)... With a 4x increase in spatial resolution by MASER, the recognition accuracy improves by 5.74%, implying a significant performance elevation in brain-computer interface (BCI) command mapping. Moreover, a case study of motor imagery recognition highlights the advantages conferred by high-resolution EEG signals.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper ini secara eksplisit menggunakan arsitektur Mamba (Modern SSM) melalui 'eMamba block' sebagai komponen utama untuk ekstraksi fitur EEG dan prediksi sinyal. Metrik kuantitatif dilaporkan untuk super-resolution (NMSE turun 16.25%, Pearson naik 1.13%) dan downstream BCI (akurasi motor imagery naik 5.74%). MASER secara jelas mendemonstrasikan integrasi Modern SSM dalam pipeline BCI dengan hasil terukur. Semua kriteria PICOS terpenuhi dengan jelas → INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Meskipun tugas utama adalah super-resolution EEG (bukan dekoding klasifikasi secara langsung), paper ini melaporkan studi kasus motor imagery recognition dengan metrik kuantitatif akurasi dekoding BCI (5.74% improvement). eMamba block adalah arsitektur inti berbasis Mamba (Modern SSM) yang digunakan sebagai backbone utuh untuk pemodelan fitur temporal EEG. P: data EEG ✓, I: Mamba sebagai backbone utama ✓, O: metrik kuantitatif (NMSE, Pearson correlation, recognition accuracy) ✓, S: riset orisinal, Inggris ✓. Memenuhi semua kriteria → INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MASER: Enhancing EEG Spatial Resolution With State Space Modeling.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract states the goal is to 'investigate oscillatory changes in infant fNIRS signals' and 'frequency-specific functional connectivity', using a statistical method (OSC-DECOMP) based on Gaussian linear state space models, with no mention of decoding, prediction, classification, or deep learning.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE karena meskipun melibatkan state-space models, ini adalah model statistik klasik (Gaussian linear state space models), bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (seperti Mamba/S4). Studi ini bertujuan investigasi ilmiah terhadap sinyal fNIRS, bukan aplikasi dekoding/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis berbasis AI. Tidak ada output model AI kuantitatif.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE karena studi ini menggunakan data fNIRS tetapi tujuannya adalah analisis osilasi dan konektivitas fungsional, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. Metode OSC-DECOMP adalah statistik berbasis Gaussian linear state space models, bukan deep learning dengan Modern SSM. Tidak ada metrik akurasi dekoding. Memenuhi beberapa criteria exclusion (P-NOMATCH, I-NOMATCH, O-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Oscillator decomposition of infant fNIRS data.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: employing fifth-order state-space dynamic systems for feature extraction, we tested various classifiers, with the decision tree and 1 s epochs achieving the highest performance
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: 摘要中提及'state-space modeling'，但这是传统系统识别方法，用于特征提取，而非现代SSM深度学习架构。没有证据显示使用深度学习或现代SSM作为骨干。因此，即使自由解释，仍不符合I标准。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 文章使用经典状态空间模型（fifth-order state-space dynamic systems）进行特征提取，并非现代SSM架构（如Mamba、S4）；且分类器为决策树，不是深度学习模型。因此，不满足I标准（需要现代SSM作为深度学习架构的主要模块）。日期未提供，可能影响S标准，但主要问题在于I。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Automated Seizure Detection Based on State-Space Model Identification.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: MI-Mamba processes multi-channel EEG signals through a single convolutional layer to capture spatial features in the local temporal domain, followed by a Mamba module that processes global temporal features. [...] achieves 80.59% accuracy in the four-class MI task [...] and 84.42% in the two-class task [...] while reducing parameter count by nearly six times.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Straightforward INCLUDE: Mamba is the main temporal modeling module in a hybrid CNN-Mamba architecture for motor imagery EEG decoding, with quantitative accuracy and efficiency metrics on standard BCI competition datasets.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: CNN+Mamba hybrid where Mamba processes global temporal features — clear role as primary sequential modeling backbone. Accuracies reported on two public MI-EEG datasets. Parameter efficiency also reported. Meets all PICO criteria squarely.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MI-Mamba: A hybrid motor imagery electroencephalograph classification model with Mamba's global scanning.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The EM algorithm, Kalman filtering, and bootstrap resampling are used to fit the state space model — ini adalah SSM klasik berbasis statistik, bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena). Tidak disebutkan deep learning atau arsitektur modern SSM manapun.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun judul mengandung 'state space model' dan abstrak menyebut EEG data untuk klasifikasi kelompok diagnostik (alcoholism case-control), metode yang digunakan adalah pendekatan statistik klasik (Kalman filter + EM) tanpa komponen deep learning sama sekali. Tidak ada Modern SSM yang digunakan. Bahkan dengan interpretasi liberal, tidak ada dasar untuk memasukkan paper ini ke dalam scope review tentang Structured State-Space Sequence Models modern. EXCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Artikel ini mengusulkan state space model klasik yang menggunakan EM algorithm, Kalman filtering, dan bootstrap resampling — metode statistik klasik yang secara eksplisit dikecualikan dalam kriteria Intervensi (I-NOMATCH: State-Space Model Klasik, Kalman Filter tradisional). Tidak ada indikasi penggunaan deep learning atau arsitektur Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, dll.). Outcome berupa perbandingan statistik antar grup diagnostik, bukan metrik kuantitatif akurasi dekoding berbasis AI. EXCLUDE jelas.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A latent state space model for estimating brain dynamics from electroencephalogram (EEG) data.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'we applied a novel state-space model to a large-scale fMRI dataset to investigate latent brain states and their dynamics during a gender-Stroop task' — this describes a classical statistical state-space model for latent state discovery, not a Modern SSM deep learning architecture. Additionally, outcomes are 'occupancy rates (OR) and mean lifetimes (ML)' predicting 'Stroop effect', which are neuroscience measures, not AI decoding metrics.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Even with liberal interpretation, the 'state-space model' here clearly refers to a classical statistical framework for identifying latent brain states and their temporal dynamics (occupancy rates, mean lifetimes). This is fundamentally different from Modern SSM deep learning architectures. The study is a cognitive neuroscience investigation of inhibitory control, not a BCI decoding system. P-NOMATCH and I-NOMATCH are unambiguous.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The 'state-space model' referenced here is a classical statistical/computational state-space model (likely HMM or similar latent state discovery) applied to fMRI for cognitive neuroscience, NOT a Modern SSM deep learning architecture (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). The study aims to uncover brain-behavior dynamics during a Stroop task, not to decode user intent using AI. Fails P (not AI-based decoding), I (classical SSM, not Modern SSM), and O (no quantitative AI decoding metrics).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: State-space modeling uncovers brain-behavior dynamics of inhibitory control.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The model is fitted under a Bayesian hierarchical model framework coupled with a Gibbs sampler. Compared to previous mixed-effects state-space models, we directly model high-dimensional random effects matrices of interest without structural constraints — ini jelas merupakan SSM statistik klasik, bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun judul mengandung 'state-space model' dan paper menggunakan data EEG untuk prediksi (treatment effect prediction), metode yang diusulkan adalah model statistik Bayesian klasik dengan Gibbs sampler, bukan arsitektur deep learning berbasis Modern SSM. Tidak ada indikasi penggunaan Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, atau varian SSM modern lainnya. Tidak memenuhi kriteria I.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. 'State-space model' di sini merujuk pada model statistik klasik (Bayesian hierarchical framework + Gibbs sampler), bukan Modern SSM (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena). Model RESSM adalah random effects state-space model yang termasuk kategori SSM klasik (seperti Kalman Filter) yang secara eksplisit dikecualikan dalam protokol. Q3 gagal: bukan deep learning.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A hierarchical random effects state-space model for modeling brain activities from electroencephalogram data.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The scheme involves two main steps: model estimation and model inference... model estimation performs a subspace identification and active source selection based on group-norm regularized least-squares. The model inference relies on the concept of state-space GC that requires solving a Riccati equation for the covariance of estimation error. Our method achieved better performances than a two-stage approach... under the assumptions that the true source dynamics are sparse and generated from state-space models.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun judul mengandung 'State-Space' dan menggunakan data EEG, bahkan interpretasi liberal sekalipun tidak dapat mengubah fakta bahwa: (1) metode ini adalah state-space model klasik dari teori estimasi/kontrol, bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM; (2) output berupa estimasi konektivitas (Granger causality), bukan dekoding/klasifikasi berbasis AI. Tidak ada frasa yang mengindikasikan penggunaan jaringan saraf modern atau arsitekturnya mirip Mamba/S4. EXCLUDE tetap tepat.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE pada dua level: (1) P-NOMATCH — tujuan studi adalah estimasi konektivitas otak (brain effective connectivity/Granger causality), bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis berbasis model AI; (2) I-NOMATCH — metode yang digunakan adalah state-space model klasik (subspace identification, solusi Riccati equation, regularized least-squares), yang secara eksplisit termasuk dalam kategori EXCLUDE ('State-Space Model Klasik'). Tidak ada deep learning modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) di sini.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Granger Causality Inference in EEG Source Connectivity Analysis: A State-Space Approach.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose to model the background oscillations using a novel oscillation state-space representation... We employ a generalized expectation maximization algorithm for estimating the model parameters.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun melibatkan data EEG dan model state-space, metode yang digunakan adalah model statistik tradisional dengan algoritma EM, bukan deep learning. Tidak ada indikasi implementasi Modern SSM seperti Mamba/S4, dan tujuannya adalah analisis sinyal, bukan dekoding berbasis AI. Kriteria inti I (intervensi) tidak terpenuhi.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini mengusulkan model state-space statistik (bukan deep learning) untuk pemrosesan sinyal ERP, dengan tujuan ekstraksi sinyal dan peningkatan SNR, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. Tidak memenuhi P (tujuan bukan AI decoding), I (bukan Modern SSM/deep learning, melainkan SSM klasik), dan O (metrik bukan akurasi dekoding kuantitatif).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Multilevel State-Space Models Enable High Precision Event Related Potential Analysis.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The regional spatiotemporal Kalman filter (RSTKF) is a generalization of the spatiotemporal Kalman filter (STKF)... It is based on state-space modeling with spatially heterogeneous dynamical noise variances. The study applies RSTKF to localize deep-brain sources and compare with LORETA and STKF, reporting spatial resolution improvements rather than AI decoding metrics.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Bahkan dengan interpretasi paling longgar, paper ini gagal pada kriteria Intervensi: metode yang digunakan adalah Kalman Filter, yang secara definitif termasuk SSM Klasik dan secara eksplisit dikecualikan dari Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, dll.). Tidak ada indikasi penggunaan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM sama sekali. Selain itu, EEG source imaging (masalah invers) bukan merupakan tugas dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI dalam konteks BCI. Tidak ada celah untuk interpretasi inklusif.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini mengimplementasikan 'regional spatiotemporal Kalman filter (RSTKF)', yang secara eksplisit merupakan generalisasi dari Kalman Filter klasik untuk EEG source imaging (masalah invers pemodelan sumber). Ini jelas tergolong State-Space Model Klasik (Kalman Filter tradisional), yang secara eksplisit dikecualikan dalam kriteria Intervensi (I-NOMATCH). Selain itu, tujuan studi adalah rekonstruksi/lokalisasi sumber otak, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis berbasis AI (P-NOMATCH). Metrik yang dilaporkan adalah resolusi spasial akurasi lokalisasi, bukan metrik kuantitatif dekoding AI seperti Akurasi/AUC/RMSE (O-NOMATCH). Tidak ada keraguan sama sekali.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Source imaging of deep-brain activity using the regional spatiotemporal Kalman filter.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The key novelty of our approach stems from the development of a two-timescale linear state-space model to extract 'spatio-temporal' (aka causal) signatures from an individual's fMRI time series data.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Potentially UNCERTAIN. The paper mentions 'state-space model' which is the same broad family name as Modern SSMs. Could the 'two-timescale linear state-space model' be a variant or simplification of modern SSM? The paper also uses GNN (deep learning) for task identification. However, descriptors like 'linear' and 'two-timescale' and use for causal fingerprinting (not sequential backbone modeling) strongly point to classical SSM methodology. Even liberally, the SSM is a feature extraction step, not a deep learning sequential backbone — it does not serve as the 'main module for temporal/sequential dependency modeling' per operational definitions. Likely still EXCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The 'two-timescale linear state-space model' described here is a classical/statistical state-space model used for causal feature extraction from fMRI, not a Modern SSM architecture (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Key indicators: (1) explicitly 'linear' state-space model, (2) used for causal dynamics analysis, (3) no mention of any Modern SSM terminology. The deep learning component (GNN for task identification) is a Graph Neural Network, which is not an SSM. Falls under exclusion criteria: 'State-Space Model Klasik' (I-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Causality-based Subject and Task Fingerprints using fMRI Time-series Data.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We proposed a novel ADTF, which solves the dynamic system in the L1-norm space (L1-ADTF)... we designed an iteration strategy with the alternating direction method of multipliers, which could be used for the solution of the dynamic state-space model restricted in the L1-norm space. Furthermore, we compared L1-ADTF to traditional ADTF and its dual extension across both simulation and real EEG experiments.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE — Meskipun judul menyebut 'neural network' dan abstrak menyebut 'dynamic state-space model', konteksnya jelas berbeda: 'neural network' merujuk pada jaringan saraf otak (brain neural network), bukan arsitektur deep learning. 'State-space model' yang digunakan adalah framework klasik untuk estimasi konektivitas otak (ADTF), diselesaikan dengan optimisasi matematis (ADMM), bukan parameterisasi kontinu Modern SSM seperti Mamba/S4. Tidak ada satu pun indikasi deep learning dalam abstrak.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE — Paper ini mengusulkan L1-ADTF (Adaptive Directed Transfer Function dalam ruang L1-norm) yang menyelesaikan model state-space dinamis klasik menggunakan optimisasi ADMM. Ini adalah metode pemrosesan sinyal/statistik konvensional, bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Tidak ada penyebutan deep learning, neural network dalam konteks DL, atau arsitektur SSM modern. Q3 gagal: tidak ada implementasi deep learning. Selain itu, 'dynamic state-space model' yang dimaksud adalah state-space model klasik yang secara eksplisit dikecualikan dalam briefing.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: L1-norm based time-varying brain neural network and its application to dynamic analysis for motor imagery.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We investigate this question by employing an adaptive linear state-space model for ECoG network activity...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun menyebut 'state-space model', abstrak secara eksplisit menyebutkan 'linear' dan 'adaptive', tanpa indikasi deep learning atau parameterisasi kontinu Modern SSM. Tetap tergolong SSM klasik, sehingga tidak memenuhi kriteria I.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Model yang digunakan adalah 'adaptive linear state-space model', yang merupakan state-space model klasik/linier. Ini bukan deep learning dan bukan arsitektur Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, dll.) sesuai definisi operasional. Jelas tidak memenuhi kriteria I (Intervention).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Adaptive tracking of human ECoG network dynamics.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We use a state space model to estimate the component oscillations, avoiding problems with frequency band selection, nonlinearities, and sharp signal transitions. We represent cross-frequency coupling in parametric and time-varying forms... estimate the posterior distribution of the coupling parameters to derive their credible intervals. — This describes classical statistical/Bayesian state-space methods for signal decomposition, NOT modern SSM deep learning architectures. Additionally, the task is PAC analysis (neuroscience signal analysis), not AI-based decoding/prediction/classification.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: One could argue 'state space model' might encompass modern SSM architectures, and the paper does use EEG and LFP data with quantitative evaluation on simulated and real data. However, the methodology description (posterior distributions, credible intervals, frequency band estimation) unambiguously points to classical statistical state-space methods (likely Kalman filtering or Bayesian approaches), not deep learning. Even liberally interpreted, this fails the intervention criterion. Exclude.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: This paper uses classical statistical state-space models for phase-amplitude coupling analysis, not modern SSM deep learning architectures (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). The language clearly indicates classical Bayesian/statistical signal processing: 'estimate the posterior distribution,' 'credible intervals,' 'parametric and time-varying forms.' Furthermore, the task is signal analysis (PAC estimation), not AI-based decoding/prediction/classification of user intent or neurological conditions. Exclude at I-NOMATCH and arguably P-NOMATCH.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: State space methods for phase amplitude coupling analysis.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We construct a new Riemannian state-space model (RSSM) to define a hidden SPD matrix state... develop a new Riemannian Particle Filter (RPF) algorithm to estimate the hidden low-dimensional SPD matrix state... develop a new Riemannian Expectation Maximization (REM) algorithm to fit the RSSM parameters — semua metode ini adalah framework statistik klasik (Particle Filter, EM), bukan deep learning. Tidak ada satu pun referensi ke neural network, deep learning, atau arsitektur Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Tetap EXCLUDE meskipun bersikap liberal. Meskipun judul dan abstrak menggunakan istilah 'state-space model', konteksnya sangat jelas: ini adalah model state-space statistik klasik yang beroperasi pada Riemannian manifold menggunakan Particle Filter dan EM algorithm untuk estimasi parameter. Tidak ada elemen deep learning yang disebutkan—tidak ada neural network, tidak ada Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena, tidak ada training gradient-based. Pendekatan yang digunakan adalah Bayesian inference klasik (particle filter) dan maximum likelihood estimation (EM), bukan deep learning sequence modeling. Tidak memenuhi kriteria I.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Jelas EXCLUDE. Paper ini mengembangkan Riemannian State-Space Model (RSSM) yang merupakan model state-space statistik/klasik berbasis matematika pada manifold Riemannian, menggunakan Riemannian Particle Filter (RPF) dan Riemannian Expectation Maximization (REM). Ini adalah metode statistik klasik (turunan dari Kalman filter/Particle filter), BUKAN arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (S4, Mamba, H3, Hyena). Tidak ada disebutkan neural network atau deep learning sama sekali. I-NOMATCH.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Dynamic and low-dimensional modeling of brain functional connectivity on Riemannian manifolds.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Metode disebut 'unsupervised learning method for sequential detection' menggunakan 'state-space model (SSM) to detect the onset of acute pain signals' — tanpa indikasi deep learning, dan dibandingkan hanya dengan SVM classifier. Tidak ada mention Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) atau deep learning dalam abstrak.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: UNCERTAIN: Istilah 'state-space model (SSM)' bisa ambigu — mungkin ini Modern SSM yang diterapkan untuk sekuens EEG. Namun, tidak ada satupun indikasi deep learning dalam abstrak (tidak ada mention neural network, deep learning, Mamba, S4, dsb.), metode dibandingkan dengan SVM saja, dan framing 'unsupervised learning' untuk deteksi onset sinyal lebih condong ke arah statistik/klasik. Bahkan secara liberal, bukti kuat mengarah ke SSM klasik. Perlu full-text untuk verifikasi definitif apakah ini implementasi Modern SSM atau SSM statistik klasik.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE: Istilah 'state-space model (SSM)' di sini merujuk pada model statistik klasik untuk deteksi onset sinyal, bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena). Bukti kuat: (1) metode disebut 'unsupervised learning method' tanpa terminologi deep learning sama sekali, (2) dibandingkan dengan SVM (klasik ML) bukan Transformer/NN, (3) konteks deteksi onset sinyal pasca-source localization = pendekatan signal processing/statistik, (4) disebutkan 'fewer number of training trials' yang ciri metode statistik, bukan deep learning. Ini adalah SSM klasik → EXCLUDE I-NOMATCH.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Detecting acute pain signals from human EEG.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The deep learning architecture is 'Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)' used for feature propagation on an enhanced fused graph. The 'SSM' referenced ('Sample-by-sample Similarity Matrix') is a similarity graph construction method, not a Structured State-Space Sequence Model. No Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, or any Modern SSM variant is mentioned.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Even with a liberal lens, there is no Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, S5, DSS, etc.) anywhere in this architecture. The model is purely GCN-based with graph fusion and PCA-based feature extraction. The acronym 'SSM' is misleading but refers to a similarity matrix, not an SSM architecture. No hybrid or partial use of Modern SSM exists.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. GCN (Graph Convolutional Network) is the sole deep learning backbone. 'SSM' in this paper stands for 'Sample-by-sample Similarity Matrix'—a graph construction method, absolutely NOT the Structured State-Space Sequence Models (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) defined in our protocol. No Modern SSM component is present in any capacity.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Semi-supervised EEG emotion recognition model based on enhanced graph fusion and GCN.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: This study challenges the traditional focus on zero-lag statistics in resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rsfMRI) research. Instead, it advocates for considering time-lag interactions to unveil the directionality and asymmetries of the brain hierarchy.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Even with a liberal interpretation, the study does not implement modern SSM as defined (e.g., Mamba, S4) and is centered on analytical modeling of brain dynamics rather than AI decoding tasks. The use of state-space models is classical and not deep learning, so it should still be EXCLUDED.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE: The study employs a classical linear state-space model and dynamical causal modeling (DCM) for analyzing brain hierarchies, which are not modern deep learning SSM architectures like Mamba or S4. The focus is on understanding effective connectivity and asymmetries, not on AI-based decoding, prediction, or classification of user intent or neurological conditions, failing both Population and Intervention criteria.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Analyzing asymmetry in brain hierarchies with a linear state-space model of resting-state fMRI data.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'we develop a voxel-based state space modeling method for recovering task-related state spaces from human fMRI data' — ini adalah metode state-space klasik untuk analisis neurosains (dimensionality reduction), bukan implementasi arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM. Tidak ada penyebutan deep learning, Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, atau arsitektur neural network apapun. Output berupa 'distinct brain states embedded in low-dimensional state space' adalah deskriptif, bukan metrik kuantitatif akurasi dekoding AI.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE — Istilah 'state space modeling' dapat diinterpretasikan secara longgar sebagai terkait domain SSM. Paper menggunakan fMRI (data otak) dan melaporkan recovery 'task-related cognitive states' yang bisa dianggap sebagai bentuk decoding. Namun, tidak ada bukti konkret penggunaan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM maupun metrik kuantitatif AI.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE — 'voxel-based state space modeling' merujuk pada metode state-space klasik (statistika/matematika) untuk menganalisis dinamika populasi saraf pada fMRI, bukan arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM (S4, Mamba, H3, Hyena). Tidak disebutkan deep learning, neural network, atau arsitektur SSM modern sama sekali. Juga, output berupa 'low-dimensional subspace' dan 'brain states' adalah framework analisis neurosains deskriptif, bukan model AI dekoding/klasifikasi dengan metrik kuantitatif.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Voxel-Based State Space Modeling Recovers Task-Related Cognitive States in Naturalistic fMRI Experiments.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We introduce Geo-Mamba, a geometric variant of Mamba formulated on Riemannian manifolds. Geo-Mamba employs a dual-path selective state-space design...evaluated on seven public fMRI datasets, including two Alzheimer's disease cohorts, three Parkinson's disease cohorts, one Autism dataset...we apply Geo-Mamba to three electroencephalography (EEG) datasets. Across these benchmarks, it delivers consistently competitive accuracy and robustness.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Jelas INCLUDE. Paper mengintro Geo-Mamba yang merupakan varian geometrik Mamba langsung, menggunakan selective state-space modeling sebagai arsitektur inti. Data otak fMRI dan EEG digunakan untuk klasifikasi kondisi neurologis (Alzheimer, Parkinson, Autism, perubahan otak akibat kontak olahraga). Evaluasi kuantitatif pada 10 dataset. Semua kriteria terpenuhi tanpa ambiguitas.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Meskipun Geo-Mamba memodifikasi Mamba agar beroperasi pada manifold Riemannian (bukan formulasi vanilla Mamba), inti arsitekturnya secara eksplisit adalah 'a geometric variant of Mamba' dengan 'dual-path selective state-space design'. Modifikasi geometris ini tidak mengubah fakta bahwa Mamba/SSM modern adalah backbone utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal. P (fMRI + EEG untuk klasifikasi Alzheimer/Parkinson/Autism), I (Mamba sebagai core), O ('consistently competitive accuracy' pada multiple benchmarks kuantitatif), S (orisinal, riset baru). Tetap INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Geo-Mamba: Geometry-informed state-space learning of functional brain organization.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: the next-generation state-space model Mamba is utilized as a temporal feature extractor; achieved an AUROC of 0.931 for seizure detection; improved training speed by 10 times and reduced memory usage to less than one-seventh.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: 文章明确使用EEG数据进行AI检测，实施了基于Mamba的深度学习架构，其中Mamba作为时序特征提取器，与动态图神经网络结合。报告了优越的性能指标（AUROC 0.931）和效率提升（训练速度提高10倍，内存减少），完全符合纳入标准。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 虽然摘要未明确年份，但Mamba是近年提出的模型，且内容涉及现代SSM应用，很可能在2021年后。Mamba作为时序特征提取器，是模型的主要组件，符合现代SSM作为主干或主要时序模块的定义。报告了量化指标（AUROC）和效率参数（训练速度、内存使用），满足所有标准。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A Novel State Space Model with Dynamic Graphic Neural Network for EEG Event Detection.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes a standard fNIRS study on motor sequence learning without mentioning any deep learning models, AI, or SSM architectures.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. There is no mention of deep learning, AI models, or SSM architectures (Mamba, S4, etc.) in the abstract.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. This is a standard neuroscience study using fNIRS to analyze motor sequence learning, not an AI-based decoding study.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Involvement of the prefrontal cortex in motor sequence learning: A functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) study.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: we introduce Mamba, a selective state-space model... to effectively capture long-range dependencies... CP-SSM surpasses Transformer-based models in classification performance while significantly reducing computational complexity.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Core-Periphery Principle Guided State Space Model for Functional Connectome Classification.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: MIFNet incorporates a MamBa-based temporal module... bridging the gap between localized feature extraction and global temporal modeling.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Mifnet: a MamBa-based interactive frequency convolutional neural network for motor imagery decoding.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Abstrak menyebutkan 'frequent, long runs of slow spike wave discharges on EEG' untuk karakterisasi fenotip mouse, tetapi tidak ada penyebutan tujuan dekoding/prediksi berbasis AI atau implementasi model deep learning.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun menggunakan data EEG (aktivitas otak), abstrak ini sepenuhnya berfokus pada fenotipologi dan tidak ada indikasi penggunaan model AI untuk dekoding atau prediksi. Tidak ada referensi ke deep learning atau arsitektur seperti Mamba/S4, sehingga bahkan dengan interpretasi liberal, tetap EXCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Studi ini adalah penelitian orisinal pada model mouse dengan data EEG untuk karakterisasi fenotip neurologis, namun tidak menyebutkan tujuan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI atau implementasi deep learning. Oleh karena itu, secara ketat tidak memenuhi kriteria P (data otak untuk AI dekoding) dan I (arsitektur Modern SSM). EXCLUDE dengan P-NOMATCH.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Altered neurological and neurobehavioral phenotypes in a mouse model of the recurrent KCNB1-p.R306C voltage-sensor variant.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract discusses melanoma histologic subtypes, anti-PD-1 and/or anti-CTLA-4 treatment, and whole-exome and whole-transcriptome sequencing data to identify genes and pathways, rather than brain activity signals for AI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The study does not involve brain data (P-NOMATCH) nor does it use Modern SSM architectures (I-NOMATCH). The content is purely clinical oncology/genomics analysis.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The study focuses on melanoma immunotherapy and genomics, not brain activity signals (EEG/fMRI) for AI decoding. It fails the Population (P) criterion immediately.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Different Response to Immunotherapy According to Melanoma Histologic Subtype.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: novel convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture designed to enhance the multiclass classification accuracy of motor imagery (MI) signals acquired through EEG-based sensing.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. The abstract explicitly identifies the method as a 'convolutional neural network (CNN)', which falls under the category of standard architectures (RNN/LSTM/CNN) excluded from the review scope.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper implements a standard Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), which is explicitly excluded from the scope as it is not a Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Motor imagery-based neural networks for assisting tetraplegic patients.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract states 'The spectral dynamic causal modeling approach was implemented to estimate EC...'. DCM is a classical statistical method, not a Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, etc.) or Deep Learning architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Although DCM is a state-space model, the briefing explicitly excludes 'State-Space Model Klasik (Kalman Filter...)' and requires 'Modern SSM' (Mamba, S4, etc.) as the intervention.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper uses 'spectral dynamic causal modeling' (DCM), which is a classical statistical method for estimating effective connectivity, not a Deep Learning architecture like Mamba or S4. The briefing explicitly excludes Classical SSMs (Kalman Filter, DCM).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Association between emotional intelligence and effective brain connectome: A large-scale spectral DCM study.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Unlike existing deep learning approaches, our models are interpretable and efficient... multi-session state-space model... multi-session reduced-rank regression model
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE. Evidence: 'multi-session state-space model' and 'neural decoding'. The paper fits P (brain data for AI decoding) and O (accuracy metrics). The term 'state-space' might be confused with Modern SSMs, but the context suggests classical methods.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Reason: I-NOMATCH. The abstract explicitly contrasts the proposed models ('state-space model' and 'reduced-rank regression') with 'deep learning approaches', indicating the use of classical statistical methods rather than Modern SSMs (Mamba, S4, etc.).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Exploiting correlations across trials and behavioral sessions to improve neural decoding.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We validate the proposed approach on three benchmark datasets: TUSZ dataset (for EEG-based epileptic seizure detection), DOD-H dataset (for EEG-based sleep stage classification), and ICBEB dataset (for ECG-based cardio disease classification). The model achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets. Notably, ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each proposed component.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Perspektif LIBERAL: Mamba digunakan sebagai komponen utama untuk pemodelan temporal ('parallel Mamba layers') pada data EEG (P terpenuhi), model diuji pada benchmark datasets dan mengklaim state-of-theart performance, yang menyiratkan adanya metrik kuantitatif. Dengan demikian, INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Perspektif STRICT: Abstract tidak menyebutkan metrik kuantitatif (akurasi, AUC, RMSE, latensi, dll.) secara eksplisit, hanya mengklaim 'state-of-the-art performance' secara umum. Tanpa bukti konkret, Outcome (O) tidak dapat diverifikasi, sehingga EXCLUDE (O-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Adaptive long-range modeling of EEG and ECG with Mamba and dynamic graph learning.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: EEG digunakan semata untuk fenotipik observasional ('frequent, long runs of spike wave discharges on EEG') dan studi ini berfokus pada 'molecular and phenotypic effects' dari model tikus KCNB1-p.R306C. Tidak disebutkan deep learning, model AI, atau metrik dekoding kuantitatif apapun.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun studi ini menggunakan data EEG (spike-wave discharges) pada tikus, penggunaan EEG di sini murni untuk karakterisasi fenotip klinis/model penyakit—bukan untuk membangun atau mengevaluasi model AI untuk dekoding. Tidak ada jejak implementasi deep learning maupun SSM modern dalam abstrak. Tidak ada ruang untuk interpretasi liberal karena kedua kriteria inti (P dan I) jelas tidak terpenuhi.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Studi ini adalah penelitian neurosains molekuler/genetik pada model tikus (Kcnb1-R306C) yang menggunakan EEG semata-mata untuk karakterisasi fenotipik (mengamati spike-wave discharges), bukan untuk tujuan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. Tidak ada implementasi deep learning apapun, apalagi Modern SSM. Gagal pada P (data otak tidak digunakan untuk AI decoding) dan I (tidak ada deep learning).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Altered neurological and neurobehavioral phenotypes in a mouse model of the recurrent KCNB1-p.R306C voltage-sensor variant.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract mentions 'graph theory analysis and scaled subprofile modeling (SSM)' to identify patterns. SSM is a statistical technique, not a Deep Learning architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: While SSM stands for State Space Model, in this context (fMRI), it refers to 'Scaled Subprofile Modeling', a statistical pattern recognition technique, not a Deep Learning architecture like Mamba or S4. It lacks the Deep Learning component required by the protocol.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The paper uses 'scaled subprofile modeling (SSM)' and 'graph theory'. Neither is a Deep Learning architecture. SSM is a statistical technique. Therefore, it fails the 'Deep Learning' check (Q3) and the 'Modern SSM' check (Q4). It is excluded.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Novel Analysis Identifying Functional Connectivity Patterns Associated with Posttraumatic Stress Disorder.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The same raw data were then truncated in length and fitted to multiple dynamic state space models of order nx using a continuous-time subspace-based system identification algorithm.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The methodology described ('continuous-time subspace-based system identification') falls under Classical SSMs, which are explicitly excluded from the review scope as per the Operational Definitions (I-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The abstract describes the use of 'dynamic state space models' and 'continuous-time subspace-based system identification', which are characteristics of Classical SSMs (e.g., Kalman Filters, Reduced-Rank Regression) rather than Modern SSMs (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Additionally, the text mentions 'six ML algorithms' feeding raw signals, which implies classical ML rather than Deep Learning architectures.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Machine Learning Classification of Event-Related Brain Potentials during a Visual Go/NoGo Task.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract states the study proposes a 'two-step network estimation: Tabu search local method and global maximization in the selected subgroup [partial conditional directed acyclic graph (DAG) + multiregression dynamic model]', indicating a statistical approach rather than a Deep Learning architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The paper focuses on statistical modeling (MRDM) for fNIRS hyperscanning rather than implementing Deep Learning architectures or Modern SSMs.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The method described in the abstract is 'multiregression dynamic models' combined with 'Tabu search', which are statistical inference techniques for network estimation, not Deep Learning architectures like Mamba, S4, or SSMs.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Hyperscanning fNIRS data analysis using multiregression dynamic models: an illustration in a violin duo.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes the development of a portable EEG device for sleep monitoring and validation against a research-grade counterpart, with no mention of AI or deep learning for decoding/prediction tasks.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE as the abstract mentions no involvement of deep learning, SSM, or quantitative AI metrics for decoding; it is purely a device validation study.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE because the study focuses on hardware development for EEG signal acquisition and sleep stage scoring without implementing or evaluating any AI-based decoding/prediction model.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A low-cost and open-hardware portable 3-electrode sleep monitoring device.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study used functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) of the spinal cord, not brain activity data, and its objective was to develop and validate an fMRI protocol for assessing spinal cord activity, with no mention of AI-based decoding, prediction, or classification models or quantitative AI metrics.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun menggunakan fMRI, fokus studi adalah pada sumsum tulang belakang (bukan otak) dan bertujuan untuk memvalidasi protokol neuroimaging fisiologis, bukan implementasi atau evaluasi model AI untuk dekoding. Tidak ada metrik kuantitatif terkait AI. Oleh karena itu, tetap tidak memenuhi kriteria.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Studi ini menggunakan fMRI sumsum tulang belakang, bukan data aktivitas otak, dan tidak melibatkan model AI atau dekoding berbasis AI. Sehingga jelas tidak memenuhi kriteria P (Population) dan O (Outcome).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Spinal Cord Lower Urinary Tract Control in Humans.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We use Neuropixels probes to record the simultaneous extracellular activity of populations of neurons in two regions of the vocal motor pathway [in awake-singing songbirds]. Our state-space models suggest a unique and continuous-over-time correspondence between the latent space of RA and vocal output... decoding models using neural latents generalize to novel sub-populations in each region.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: One could argue that spiking data (Neuropixels) is explicitly listed in the P criteria data types, and that 'decoding models' for vocal output reconstruction exist. However, even liberally interpreted: (1) songbirds are explicitly excluded by the edge-case clause which only extends to NHP, and (2) 'state-space models' here unambiguously refer to classical statistical SSMs for neural latent dynamics (dimensionality reduction + trajectory analysis), not modern SSM deep-learning architectures. No mention of Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, or any neural network backbone. The gap is too wide to bridge.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: P-NOMATCH: Songbird data falls outside the defined population scope which explicitly includes human and non-human primate (NHP) brain data only — songbirds are not primates. I-NOMATCH: The 'state-space models' referenced are classical neuroscience latent-variable models (e.g., GPFA/LFADS-style population dynamics analysis), not modern deep-learning SSM architectures (Mamba, S4, Hyena, etc.). The decoding models mentioned are also unspecified and likely classical regression-based. This is a basic neuroscience study on motor-vocal neural dynamics, not a BCI/deep-learning study.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Neural population dynamics in songbird RA and HVC during learned motor-vocal behavior.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Abstract mentions 'two-timescale linear state-space model' and 'data-driven identification', but does not mention Modern SSM architectures like Mamba, S4, or H3.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. While the paper uses a state-space formalism, it lacks the specific 'Modern SSM' architectures (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) required by the briefing. The method is a statistical model for causal inference, not a deep learning architecture like Mamba.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper proposes a 'two-timescale linear state-space model' and 'data-driven identification', which describes a statistical/causal inference model (likely Kalman Filter or similar Classical SSM). This falls under the 'State-Space Model Klasik' exclusion criteria and does not utilize Modern SSM architectures like Mamba, S4, or H3.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Reconstructing brain causal dynamics for subject and task fingerprints using fMRI time-series data.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Our method leverages the Mamba Block, which has been proven effective in traditional visual tasks, to define FC-specified sequential patterns and integrate them with a multi-task residual GAN to harmonize multi-site FC data.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Artikel ini menggunakan fMRI (data otak) dengan metode deep learning (GAN) yang secara eksplisit disebut 'Mamba-based'. Mamba Block digunakan untuk mendefinisikan pola sekuensial FC, menunjukkan peran utama dalam pemodelan data. Metrik performa dibandingkan dengan metode lain.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Meskipun menggunakan Mamba, tujuan utama adalah harmonisasi data (preprocessing) bukan dekoding/prediksi kondisi klinis, dan dalam arsitektur GAN, peran Mamba Block perlu diverifikasi apakah benar-benar menjadi backbone utama atau hanya komponen kecil di dalam generator.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MAMBA-BASED RESIDUAL GENERATIVE ADVERSARIAL NETWORK FOR FUNCTIONAL CONNECTIVITY HARMONIZATION DURING INFANCY.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Unlike deep learning methods, our models are efficient and interpretable... multi-session reduced-rank regression model... multi-session state-space model
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: The paper utilizes a 'state-space model' for neural decoding, which fits the broad category of SSMs, though it is a classical statistical approach rather than a deep learning architecture like Mamba or S4.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The paper explicitly contrasts its models with 'deep learning methods' and focuses on 'reduced-rank regression' and classical state-space modeling, not the Modern SSM architectures (Mamba, S4, etc.) required by the protocol.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Exploiting correlations across trials and behavioral sessions to improve neural decoding.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: This paper presents core mathematical frameworks in ML that address critical challenges in neuroscience. We introduce state-space models for closed-loop neurostimulation and discrete representation learning methods...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: The paper analyzes neuroscience data (EEG) and mentions state-space models, which are relevant to the field. However, it lacks the specific keywords for Modern SSMs (Mamba, S4, etc.) and does not specify that it uses Deep Learning architectures.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The abstract uses phrasing like 'presents core mathematical frameworks' and 'We introduce state-space models' which indicates a review paper or tutorial rather than original research implementing a specific architecture. Furthermore, it mentions Gaussian processes and beamforming but does not specify 'Deep Learning' or specific Modern SSM names (Mamba, S4, etc.), failing the I-NOMATCH criteria.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Exploring synergies: Advancing neuroscience with machine learning.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes a clinical study comparing Insomnia Disorder patients and Healthy Controls using statistical analysis (ANOVA, t-tests) and correlations on EEG data, rather than implementing a Deep Learning model with Modern SSM for AI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. The intervention is not a Deep Learning model, nor is it a Modern SSM. It is a standard clinical study.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The study uses standard statistical analysis (ANOVA, t-tests) on EEG data for clinical comparison, not a Deep Learning model with Modern SSM for AI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Decreased Delta/Beta ratio index as the sleep state-independent electrophysiological signature of sleep state misperception in Insomnia disorder: A focus on the sleep onset and the whole night.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We implemented a TBATS model to forecast SWA dynamics and compared its root mean squared errors (RMSE) against a naïve model, Holt-Winters (HW) model, and seasonal autoregressive integrated moving average (SARIMA) model. TBATS adalah trigonometric, box-cox transformation with autoregressive moving average errors and trend and seasonal/periodic components — model statistik klasik, bukan deep learning.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun judul memuat frasa 'state-space model' dan studi menggunakan data EEG primata non-manusia (memenuhi P termasuk edge case NHP) serta melaporkan RMSE (memenuhi O), TBATS secara eksplisit adalah model statistik klasik — bukan deep learning. Tidak ada indikasi penggunaan neural network, parameterisasi ruang keadaan kontinu deep learning, atau arsitektur Modern SSM. Bahkan dengan interpretasi paling liberal, TBATS tidak dapat dikategorikan sebagai Modern SSM. EXCLUDE di Q3.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. TBATS adalah model statistik klasik berbasis exponential smoothing state-space formulation (trigonometric, box-cox, ARMA errors, trend, seasonal) — bukan deep learning dan bukan Modern SSM (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena). Tidak ada satu pun komponen deep learning dalam framework ini. Perbandingan dilakukan terhadap SARIMA, Holt-Winters, dan naïve model — semua baseline statistik klasik. 'State-space' pada judul merujuk pada formulasi state-space statistik klasik (exponential smoothing state space), bukan arsitektur Modern SSM. Jelas EXCLUDE di Q3 (bukan deep learning) sekaligus I-NOMATCH.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Temporal state-space model for forecasting slow-wave EEG power in non-human primates.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract mentions 'three phase estimation methods' and 'rhythms simulated with different generative mechanisms', indicating a signal processing approach rather than a Deep Learning model using Modern SSMs.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The study uses signal processing methods (e.g., Hilbert transform) on simulated data, not Deep Learning models for BCI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The paper focuses on signal processing techniques for phase estimation in simulated neural rhythms, not deep learning architectures like Mamba or S4.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Different Methods to Estimate the Phase of Neural Rhythms Agree But Only During Times of Low Uncertainty.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'presents DiBiMa-EEGSR, a bidirectional Mamba-2 diffusion framework for spatio-temporal EEG super-resolution that reconstructs high-resolution signals from standard low-density recordings' — tujuan utama adalah rekonstruksi sinyal, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis. Namun 'conditioning on low-resolution inputs, electrode positions and task labels' mengimplikasikan konteks tugas BCI.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE. EEG super-resolution dapat dipandang sebagai komponen infrastruktur BCI yang kritis—meningkatkan kualitas sinyal input untuk downstream decoding. Paper menggunakan data EEG nyata (P), Mamba-2 sebagai backbone bidirectional state-space sekuensial utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal dengan linear complexity (I), melaporkan metrik kuantitatif 'reconstruction accuracy, spatial coherence and spectral preservation' dengan baseline CNN/Transformer/diffusion (C+O), dan merupakan riset orisinal berbahasa Inggris era modern SSM (S). Mamba-2 jelas berperan sebagai arsitektur utama.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Tujuan utama studi ini adalah EEG super-resolution (rekonstruksi sinyal beresolusi tinggi dari rekaman berkepadatan rendah), bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis. Meskipun menggunakan data EEG dan Mamba-2 sebagai backbone, output model berupa sinyal yang ditingkatkan resolusinya, bukan label dekode atau prediksi kondisi neurologis. P-NOMATCH karena tidak memenuhi definisi operasional P (tujuan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Bidirectional Mamba-2 boosts EEG super-resolution via regression and diffusion.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'We propose temporal basis function models (TBFMs) to address these difficulties' — TBFM bukan deep learning. 'begins to bridge the gap between complex AI-based approaches' — memposisikan TBFM sebagai alternatif sederhana, bukan AI/deep learning. Model SSM yang disebut hanya sebagai baseline: 'a linear state-space model requiring 90 min to train' yang kalah dibanding TBFM.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun paper menggunakan LFP dari NHP (memenuhi P) dan melaporkan metrik kuantitatif (memenuhi O), TBFM jelas bukan deep learning maupun Modern SSM. Tidak ada penyebutan Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, atau arsitektur deep learning apa pun. TBFM didefinisikan sebagai model linier sederhana berbasis fungsi temporal. Tidak ada interpretasi liberal yang dapat memasukkan paper ini ke kriteria I.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: TBFM adalah model basis fungsi temporal yang ditekankan sebagai metode SEDERHANA dan efisien, BUKAN deep learning. Abstrak secara eksplisit memposisikan TBFM sebagai alternatif terhadap pendekatan AI yang kompleks ('the gap between complex AI-based approaches'). Model SSM yang disebutkan hanyalah baseline perbandingan (linear state-space model yang kalah performa), bukan arsitektur Modern SSM. Gagal total di Q3 dan Q4.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Temporal basis function models for closed-loop neural stimulation.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Proposes Spec2VolCAMU-Net... Vision-Mamba U-Net decoder that uses linear-time state-space blocks for efficient long-range spatial modeling.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Spec2VolCAMU-Net: a spectrogram-to-volume model for EEG-to-fMRI reconstruction based on Multi-directional Time-Frequency Convolutional Attention Encoder and Vision-Mamba U-Net.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract explicitly states, 'We modeled individual learning states using a Bayesian state-space model,' which indicates a statistical approach rather than a deep learning implementation of Modern SSMs.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. The intervention is a statistical analysis tool (Bayesian state-space model) rather than a deep learning model designed for signal decoding or prediction.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper uses a statistical Bayesian state-space model to analyze fMRI data, which does not qualify as a deep learning architecture (Modern SSM) like Mamba or S4.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Increased Hippocampal Excitability and Altered Learning Dynamics Mediate Cognitive Mapping Deficits in Human Aging.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract states 'We present a didactic introduction to spectral dynamic causal modeling (DCM)...' and aims to explain technical foundations to an audience, indicating a review paper. It uses DCM to infer effective connectivity, which is a classical statistical approach, not a Modern SSM (Mamba/S4) for AI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The paper is a review/tutorial, not original research. It uses DCM, which is a classical statistical state-space model, not a Modern SSM architecture like Mamba or S4.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The paper is explicitly a 'didactic introduction' (Review paper) and uses 'Spectral DCM', a classical Bayesian state-space approach, not a Modern SSM (Mamba/S4). The goal is connectivity inference, not AI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Spectral dynamic causal modeling: A didactic introduction and its relationship with functional connectivity.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose to leverage a Switching State Space Model (SSSM) to identify the HFOs events automatically... showed improved accuracy.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: The paper uses State Space Model terminology and processes EEG data with quantitative metrics (accuracy). It could potentially be a deep learning implementation of a switching SSM, though the abstract is ambiguous.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Switching State Space Model (SSSM) is a statistical signal processing method (often synonymous with Switching Kalman Filters), not the 'Modern SSM' (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) deep learning architectures defined in the briefing. The abstract does not mention 'Deep Learning', 'Neural Network', or 'Training', only the model name.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Detection of High-Frequency Oscillations from Intracranial EEG Data with Switching State Space Model.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The PSI was lowest in S2 (20.8 ± 2.6) and increased to 30.0 ± 27.7 (p = 0.005) in S3. The SR increased from S1 (5.5 ± 10.7%) to S3 (32.7 ± 33.8%, p = 0.0001). ... We concluded that the use of EEG provides clinically relevant information about perioperative brain state changes of the isoflurane-anesthetized horse. → Semua metrik yang dilaporkan (PSI, SR, SEF95, spectral power) adalah metrik EEG tradisional/proprietary dari monitor klinis, bukan output model AI.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Tetap EXCLUDE. Meskipun menggunakan EEG (data otak), studi ini sepenuhnya adalah penelitian klinis-fisiologis observasional pada hewan (kuda) yang mengukur perubahan state otak selama anestesia menggunakan metrik EEG konvensional (Patient State Index, Suppression Ratio, Spectral Edge Frequency, analisis power spektral delta). Tidak ada komponen AI/deep learning/SSM yang dapat diidentifikasi dari judul, kata kunci, maupun abstrak.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE jelas pada Q2. Studi ini adalah observasi klinis perioperatif pada kuda yang menggunakan metrik EEG tradisional (PSI, SR, SEF95, analisis spektral daya) untuk memantau kedalaman anestesia. Tidak ada model AI, deep learning, atau metode klasifikasi/prediksi berbasis AI sama sekali. Data otak digunakan untuk tujuan monitoring fisiologis klinis, bukan dekoding/prediksi berbasis AI.
