reviewer1_perspectives.title: Perioperative Brain Function Monitoring with Electroencephalography in Horses Anesthetized with Multimodal Balanced Anesthetic Protocol Subjected to Surgeries.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study explores physiological basis for leader-follower roles using EEG and ECG, and uses a state-space model to estimate leader-follower degree parameters, not for AI-based decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE: Even if considered, the intervention is not a modern SSM deep learning architecture; it's a classical state-space model for parameter estimation, and the outcome is not quantitative decoding metrics but correlations. Fails P and I criteria.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE: The study uses EEG data but for physiological observation (leader-follower roles) not for AI-based decoding/prediction/classification. The state-space model is a classical statistical model, not a modern deep learning SSM.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: The physiological basis of leader-follower roles in the dyadic alternating tapping task.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: As our deep learning classifier, we use three diagonalized structured state-space sequence layers. ... We achieve up to 84% classification accuracy in offline analysis using an S4D-layer-based model. The S4D model outperforms the reference machine learning models.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Tidak ada ambiguitas. S4D digunakan sebagai classifier utama (bukan modul kecil atau regularizer), data adalah EEG motor imagery untuk dekoding niat pengguna, dan metrik kuantitatif tersedia. Studi juga membandingkan dengan baseline (EEGEncoder, reference ML models). Jelas INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Studi ini secara eksplisit menyebutkan penggunaan 'three diagonalized structured state-space sequence layers' sebagai deep learning classifier, dan model disebut sebagai 'S4D-layer-based model'. S4D adalah varian dari S4 (Modern SSM) yang digunakan sebagai backbone utama untuk klasifikasi MI EEG. Metrik kuantitatif akurasi dekoding dilaporkan (84% offline, 73% real-time). Semua kriteria terpenuhi secara jelas.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Improving motor imagery decoding methods for an EEG-based mobile brain-computer interface in the context of the 2024 Cybathlon.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose an approximate filter solution for a general point-process filter problem when the conditional intensity of a cell's spiking activity is characterized using a Mixture of Gaussians... This algorithm provides a real-time solution for multi-dimensional point-process filter problem and attains accuracy comparable to the exact solution. Our solution takes advantage of mixture dropping and merging algorithms, which collectively control the growth of mixture components on each filtering time-step.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE — Even with a liberal interpretation, this work is fundamentally a classical statistical filtering algorithm (point process filter with GMM approximation) applied to neural decoding. The term 'filter' and 'mixture model' do not map to Modern SSM architectures defined in the protocol (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). There is no neural network, no deep learning backbone, and no state-space sequence model in the modern sense. The speedup comes from mixture dropping/merging heuristics, not from learned parameterized state-space representations. Cannot justify inclusion under any edge case.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE — This paper proposes a classical point process filter using Gaussian Mixture Models for computational approximation. There is no mention of any Modern SSM architecture (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena, etc.) nor any deep learning component. The point process filter is a classical statistical state-space filtering method (akin to Kalman filtering for spiking data), which falls squarely under 'State-Space Model Klasik' exclusion criterion. Q3 fails — no deep learning implementation.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Real-Time Point Process Filter for Multidimensional Decoding Problems Using Mixture Models.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Spatio-Temporal Hybrid Mamba-Attention (STHMA), a framework designed to explicitly disentangle and model EEG dynamics via linear-complexity State Space Models. Decoupled Spatial-Temporal Scanning strategy... strictly separates the learning of instantaneous functional connectivity from the tracking of emotional state evolution. Extensive experiments on the FACED and SEED-V datasets demonstrate that the STHMA achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly exceeding the random chance baselines (11.11% for 9-class FACED and 20.00% for 5-class SEED-V).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper ini jelas-jelas mengusulkan STHMA (Spatio-Temporal Hybrid Mamba-Attention) — Mamba disebut langsung di judul dan abstrak sebagai komponen inti framework. 'Decoupled Spatial-Temporal Scanning strategy' menggunakan State Space Models untuk melacak evolusi state temporal EEG, yang merupakan fungsi utama backbone sekuensial. Menggunakan data EEG (otak) untuk dekoding emosi (tujuan AI). Melaporkan hasil pada dataset FACED dan SEED-V dengan klaim SOTA. Semua kriteria P, I, O, S terpenuhi dengan jelas. INCLUDE tanpa keraguan signifikan.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Judul secara eksplisit menyebut 'Hybrid Mamba-Attention' dan 'State Space Modeling'. Mamba adalah Modern SSM yang dijadikan komponen inti bersama Attention untuk pemodelan temporal EEG. Namun, perspektif strict menginginkan kejelasan apakah Mamba benar-benar backbone sekuensial utama atau hanya modul pelengkap Attention. Frasa 'Decoupled Spatial-Temporal Scanning strategy' dan 'linear-complexity State Space Models' mengindikasikan peran sentral Mamba, tetapi rincian arsitektur penuh memerlukan verifikasi full-text. Metrik kuantitatif disebut ('state-of-the-art performance', 'significantly exceeding random chance baselines') tapi angka pasti akurasi/AUC tidak eksplisit di abstrak — kemungkinan ada di body paper. Secara keseluruhan, bukti abstrak cukup kuat untuk INCLUDE namun dengan catatan kehati-hatian.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: STHMA: Decoupling Spatio-Temporal Dynamics in EEG via Hybrid State Space Modeling.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We used a novel method of rapid network model estimation from intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) data... a multiple input, single output (MISO) state space model was estimated for each output channel and time point with all other channels as inputs, generating sequential directed network graphs of channel connectivity. These networks were assessed using degree and betweenness centrality.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Bahkan dengan interpretasi liberal, 'MISO state space model' di sini adalah metode estimasi model jaringan klasik (kemungkinan berbasis least-squares atau maximum likelihood estimation) untuk menghasilkan graf konektivitas terarah — bukan implementasi arsitektur deep learning Modern SSM. Tidak ada indikasi penggunaan neural network, training dengan gradient descent, atau arsitektur seperti Mamba/S4. Outcome berupa derajat sentralitas (degree, betweenness centrality) juga bukan metrik kuantitatif dekoding AI. Tetap EXCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Studi ini menggunakan 'MISO state space model' yang merupakan model ruang keadaan klasik untuk estimasi jaringan konektivitas otak melalui metode statistik signal processing — bukan arsitektur Modern SSM deep learning (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Tidak ada deep learning yang digunakan sama sekali. Selain itu, tujuan studi adalah analisis struktur jaringan otak (network connectivity analysis), bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. EXCLUDE di Q3 (I-NOMATCH) dan juga Q2 (P-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Network analysis of preictal iEEG reveals changes in network structure preceding seizure onset.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The phrase 'state-space modeling approach based on a Gamma generalized linear model (GLM)' with 'a Gauss-Markov process on the regression weights' describes a classical statistical state-space framework, not a modern deep learning SSM architecture. The purpose is 'quantifying time-varying electrophysiological coupling' — a signal processing methodology — not AI-based decoding/prediction.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun liberal, studi ini tetap gagal pada dua kriteria fundamental. P: Tujuan utama adalah metrik PAC (signal processing methodology), bukan dekoding/klasifikasi berbasis AI — bahkan dengan interpretasi longgar, 'potential BCI applications' bukan outcome yang dilaporkan. I: 'State-space model' yang dimaksud adalah framework statistik klasik (Gamma GLM + Gauss-Markov), sama sekali bukan Structured State-Space Sequence Model modern berbasis deep learning. Tidak ada komponen neural network/deep learning yang disebutkan.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Dua alasan utama: (1) P-NOMATCH — tujuan studi ini adalah mengembangkan metrik signal processing untuk Phase-Amplitude Coupling (PAC), bukan AI-based decoding/prediction/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis. Penggunaan EEG dan synthetic signals hanya untuk validasi metode pengukuran PAC, bukan model dekoding berbasis AI. Penyebutan 'potential applications in real-time BCI' bersifat prospektif/aspirasional, bukan implementasi. (2) I-NOMATCH — 'state-space modeling approach based on a Gamma GLM' dengan 'Gauss-Markov process on the regression weights' adalah State-Space Model klasik statistik (mirip Kalman Filter/GLM), BUKAN Modern SSM deep learning (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Tidak ada deep learning yang diimplementasikan.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A Dynamic Mutual Information Measure of Phase Amplitude Coupling.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract explicitly mentions using 'Dynamic linear time invariant state-space models estimated using Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) and Weighted Least Squares (WLS)', which describes a classical statistical modeling approach rather than a Modern SSM architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Although the paper uses state-space models, it relies on statistical estimation techniques (OLS/WLS) rather than deep learning architectures like Mamba or S4 as the backbone.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper utilizes classical state-space models (likely ARMA/Kalman) estimated via Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) and Weighted Least Squares (WLS), which falls under 'State-Space Model Klasik' and not 'Modern SSM' (Mamba, S4, etc.).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Dynamic System Modeling for Reconstruction of Intracranial EEG Signals in Epilepsy Using Weighted Least Squares.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We analyzed changes in regional homogeneity (ReHo), dynamic ReHo (dReHo), fractional amplitude of low-frequency fluctuations (fALFFs), and dynamic fALFFs (dfALFFs) to assess the impact on spontaneous neuronal activity. — Tujuan studi adalah membandingkan efek stimulasi TI vs HD-tDCS pada aktivitas neuronal spontan menggunakan metrik fMRI konvensional, bukan dekoding/prediksi berbasis AI.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Meskipun menggunakan data fMRI (data aktivitas otak), studi ini sama sekali tidak mengimplementasikan sistem deep learning atau model AI apapun. Tidak ada arsitektur Modern SSM. Tidak ada metrik kuantitatif terkait performa model AI. Tidak ada celah untuk interpretasi liberal — tujuan studi ini adalah perbandingan efek stimulasi non-invasif, bukan dekoding berbasis AI. EXCLUDE (P-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Studi ini menggunakan fMRI tetapi semata-mata untuk analisis neurosains tradisional (ReHo, dReHo, fALFFs, dfALFFs) guna membandingkan efek stimulasi otak. Tidak ada model AI, machine learning, atau deep learning yang digunakan untuk dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi. Ini adalah studi klinis/fisiologis observasional murni. EXCLUDE (P-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Comparative Effects of Temporal Interference and High-Definition Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation on Spontaneous Neuronal Activity in the Primary Motor Cortex: A Randomized Crossover Study.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'Mamba state space networks achieving linear O(T) complexity' is listed as component (3) of five in HP-GNN, alongside hypergraph convolutions, adaptive hypergraph construction, physics-informed regularization, and multi-task prediction heads. The architecture is named 'Hybrid Physics-Informed Graph Neural Network.'
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Mamba secara eksplisit diintegrasikan untuk menangani pemodelan temporal dengan kompleksitas linear O(T), yang sangat krusial untuk seizure prediction berbasis EEG time-series. Mamba disebut sebagai komponen arsitektural tersendiri (bukan post-processing kecil), dan dalam konteks seizure prediction, temporal modeling adalah inti permasalahan. Bisa dianggap modul utama untuk dependensi temporal dalam framework hibrida. → INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Arsitektur utama adalah Hybrid Physics-Informed Graph Neural Network (HP-GNN), dengan hypergraph convolutions (64→128→256) sebagai backbone utama fitur spasial. Mamba hanya disebut sebagai salah satu dari lima komponen ('(3) Mamba state space networks achieving linear O(T) complexity') — bukan backbone sekuensial utama. Nama arsitektur sendiri menekankan GNN, bukan SSM. Role Mamba kemungkinan sebagai modul pendukung dalam pipeline GNN. → EXCLUDE (I-NOMATCH)
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Physics-informed graph neural networks for robust cross-patient epileptic seizure prediction via chimera state detection.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: GMamba, a novel architecture for EEG representation learning. It combines a mamba module to capture temporal dynamics and a dynamic graph module to model spatial complexity. The mamba module treats EEG signals as continuous variables to mine long-range dependencies.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper ini secara eksplisit menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) sebagai komponen inti untuk temporal modeling pada EEG, dengan evaluasi pada dataset besar (11,466 EEG-image pairs) dan klaim outperform SOTA. Tidak ada ambiguitas tentang peran Mamba dalam arsitektur. LIBERAL perspective: INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Mamba jelas disebutkan sebagai komponen utama untuk 'capture temporal dynamics' pada arsitektur GMamba. Ini adalah hybrid architecture (Graph + Mamba) dengan Mamba sebagai modul utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal, sejajar dengan Anchor 6 (Zhou et al. 2025 - 'Bidirectional Mamba Block for temporal modeling'). Meskipun detail metrik spesifik tidak disebutkan di abstract, frasa 'outperforms state-of-the-art methods' mengimplikasikan evaluasi kuantitatif. STRICT perspective: INCLUDE karena bukti peran Mamba sebagai komponen temporal utama sudah jelas.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: GMamba: EEG Representation Learning from Spatiotemporal Perspectives via Graph Mamba

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract mentions 'circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA)' and 'Low-Pass Whole-Genome Bisulfite Sequencing' for 'disease monitoring' in 'metastatic colorectal cancer', which is a genomics study, not a brain-computer interface or neuro-decoding study using EEG/fMRI.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. The domain is oncology/genomics, not neuroscience/BCI.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The study focuses on ctDNA (genomics) for cancer monitoring, not brain activity (EEG/fMRI) for AI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: ctDNA Detection with Low-Pass Whole-Genome Bisulfite Sequencing in RAS Wild-Type Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: An Exploratory Objective of the VALENTINO Trial

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes BrainMT as a hybrid framework using a 'bidirectional Mamba block' to capture global temporal interactions and a transformer block for spatial relationships. It reports state-of-the-art performance on UKBioBank and HCP datasets for classification and regression tasks.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE (Clear use of Mamba for fMRI sequence modeling with quantitative results)
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE (Mamba explicitly used for temporal modeling in hybrid architecture)
reviewer1_perspectives.title: BrainMT: A Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Architecture for Modeling Long-Range Dependencies in Functional MRI Data

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study introduces a 'hybrid Mamba classifier' for EEG-based classification of chronic neuropathic pain, achieving 99% accuracy and AUC 0.99.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Include. The abstract explicitly mentions a 'hybrid Mamba classifier' and 'deep autoencoders'. This suggests Mamba is the core component for temporal modeling, fitting the 'Hybrid' inclusion criteria where Modern SSM is the main driver.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude if the term 'hybrid' implies Mamba is merely a wrapper or combined with non-deep learning methods (e.g., SVM) rather than an architecture fusion where Mamba is the core temporal model.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Advanced EEG signal processing with deep autoencoders and hybrid Mamba classifier for accurate classification of chronic neuropathic pain etiologies

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study explicitly uses a 'sequential model based on Mamba' (a structured state space model) to capture long-range dependencies and classify state transition sequences derived from rs-fMRI for ASD diagnosis, reporting 79.7% accuracy.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Autism Spectrum Disorder diagnosis using mamba-based analysis of dynamic functional connectivity state transition sequences

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract mentions 'novel statistical methods for Markov-switching SSMs are proposed using maximum likelihood estimation, Expectation-Maximization (EM)' and 'evaluated in simulations'. This indicates a statistical approach rather than a Deep Learning Modern SSM architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Although it uses SSMs, the abstract describes statistical inference techniques rather than a Deep Learning implementation or Modern SSM architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper proposes statistical methods (MLE, EM) for Markov-switching SSMs, which are classical statistical models, not Deep Learning architectures like Mamba or S4.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Markov-switching state-space models with applications to neuroimaging

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes calculating peak amplitudes of N1 and quantifying habituation using statistical methods, with no mention of AI, Deep Learning, or SSM architectures.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The study focuses on physiological habituation analysis via standard statistical comparison, not the implementation of Deep Learning architectures like SSMs.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The study uses EEG data to analyze physiological responses (N1 habituation) using statistical methods, not AI/Deep Learning models for decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Short-Term Habituation of Auditory N1 in Spoken Word-Forms Is Modulated by Phonological Information

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Proposes EEG-ConvMamba, integrates multi-branch CNNs with a Mamba module to capture long-range temporal dependencies.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE - Menggunakan Mamba sebagai modul utama untuk pemodelan temporal, bukan hanya lapisan kecil. Ini adalah arsitektur hybrid yang valid.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE - Meskipun CNN menjadi lapisan awal, Mamba secara eksplisit disebut menangkap dependensi temporal jangka panjang, memenuhi kriteria hybrid di mana SSM adalah komponen utama untuk pemodelan sekuensial.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: EEG-ConvMamba: Motor imagery EEG decoding and visualization via convolutional neural networks and Mamba⋆

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The BMI decodes the onset of nociception via a state-space model on the basis of the analysis of online-sorted spikes recorded from the anterior cingulate cortex...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: The paper implements a state-space model for decoding neural spikes in a BMI. Given the 2021 timeframe, it is possible this refers to a Deep State Space Model (like S4) or a modern variant, fitting the target domain of spiking data decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Abstract mentions 'state-space model' but lacks specific architecture names (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) or 'Deep' qualifier. In neuroscience, 'state-space model' often refers to Kalman Filters or Linear Dynamical Systems (LDS), which are explicitly excluded as 'State-Space Model Klasik' (Kalman Filter tradisional). Without verification, it cannot be confirmed as a Modern SSM.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A prototype closed-loop brain–machine interface for the study and treatment of pain

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Brain tumor segmentation from multimodal magnetic resonance imaging... MHC-SegNet... segmentation accuracy
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Include. It uses Mamba (Modern SSM) on brain MRI data and reports quantitative segmentation metrics.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The study focuses on MRI segmentation (Computer Vision), not functional brain activity decoding (BCI/Neuro-decoding) as defined in the protocol.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MHC-Segnet: Mamba–Hadamard collaboration segmentation network for multimodal MRI brain tumor

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract states: 'In this work, we used energy landscape techniques to analyze resting state fMRI data...'. It does not mention Deep Learning, Neural Networks, or AI models.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Even under a liberal interpretation, the method is 'energy landscape techniques', which is fundamentally different from 'Modern SSM' architectures (Mamba, S4, etc.). The study focuses on statistical analysis of connectivity rather than Deep Learning implementation.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper utilizes 'energy landscape techniques' (statistical physics/graph theory) to analyze fMRI connectivity. It does not implement Deep Learning architectures or Modern SSMs (Mamba, S4, etc.). It is a standard clinical/physiological analysis, not an AI-based decoding study.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Energy landscape analysis of fMRI data from Schizophrenic and healthy subjects

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: evaluated three neural sequence architectures —Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Transformer, and Mamba (Selective State Space Model) —for ASD classification... Mamba model achieved 98.18% accuracy... Mamba+LSTM ensemble achieved 98.46% accuracy.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper ini memenuhi semua kriteria secara langsung. Menggunakan data EEG untuk klasifikasi ASD (P), menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) sebagai arsitektur utama (I), dan melaporkan metrik kuantitatif akurasi dan AUC (O).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Tidak ada ambiguitas yang signifikan. Paper ini secara eksplisit menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) untuk klasifikasi EEG. Meskipun dibandingkan dengan LSTM dan Transformer, Mamba berperan sebagai arsitektur utama yang dievaluasi dan digunakan dalam ensemble, memenuhi kriteria I (Modern SSM sebagai backbone/modul utama) dan O (metrik kuantitatif).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Quantitative EEG-based autism spectrum disorder detection using neural sequence models

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study uses 'preoperative CT images' and 'voxel-level radiomics' to predict pCR in esophageal cancer, rather than brain activity data (EEG/fMRI).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Although the architecture is Vision-Mamba, the data source is CT imaging (Radiomics), which falls under 'pengenalan citra' and not brain activity as defined in the briefing.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Data modality is CT images (Radiomics), not brain activity (EEG/fMRI). Fails Population (P) criterion.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Voxel-level radiomics and deep learning for predicting pathologic complete response in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma after neoadjuvant immunotherapy and chemotherapy

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract explicitly mentions 'Vision Mamba (Vim) Encoder' and 'State Space Models (SSMs) like Mamba' as core components of the proposed DBAM-EEG model for EEG decoding, alongside other modules. It reports quantitative classification accuracies.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Dynamic Bidirectional Attentional Mamba Model for EEG-Based Motor Imagery Classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 1) 'seizure detection from electroencephalographic signals' (data otak untuk klasifikasi kondisi neurologis). 2) 'we leverage the Structured State Space architecture, a state-of-the-art deep sequence model, to capture long-range temporal dependencies in biosignals' (penggunaan Modern SSM sebagai komponen utama untuk modeling temporal). 3) Metrik kuantitatif dilaporkan: 'outperforming... by 3.1 points in AUROC', 'a 4.1 points improvement in macro-F1 score', 'outperforming... by 2.7 points in macro-F1 score'.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper jelas menggunakan data aktivitas otak (EEG) untuk tugas dekoding (deteksi kejang) dan mengimplementasikan arsitektur Modern SSM (S4) sebagai komponen utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal sekuensial dalam framework GNN+S4. Metrik kuantitatif (AUROC, macro-F1) dilaporkan untuk semua tugas. Kehadiran tugas EEG sudah cukup untuk memenuhi kriteria P, meskipun studi juga mencakup sinyal biosignal lain. Arsitektur GraphS4mer mengintegrasikan S4 secara fundamental untuk menangani dependensi temporal, memenuhi definisi I untuk arsitektur hibrida. Diterbitkan pada 2023 dalam bahasa Inggris, memenuhi kriteria S. Sehingga, secara liberal, semua kriteria PICO terpenuhi.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Paper menggunakan EEG (data otak) untuk deteksi kejang, tetapi juga mencakup tugas dengan sinyal non-otak (polysomnography, ECG). Secara ketat, definisi P memerlukan 'data biologis aktivitas otak' untuk tujuan AI dekoding; polysomnography tidak eksplisit disebutkan dalam definisi, dan ECG jelas tidak termasuk. Namun, kehadiran satu tugas berbasis EEG (deteksi kejang) yang melibatkan kondisi neurologis mungkin cukup untuk memenuhi kriteria P. Intervensi (I) menggunakan S4, Modern SSM, sebagai modul utama untuk pemodelan temporal dalam arsitektur hibrida GNN+S4, yang sesuai dengan definisi. Outcome (O) melaporkan metrik kuantitatif (AUROC, F1). Jika fokus hanya pada data otak, studi ini mungkin memenuhi syarat, tetapi penggunaan sinyal non-otak dalam evaluasi yang sama menimbulkan pertanyaan tentang relevansi penuh dengan domain BCI.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Modeling Multivariate Biosignals With Graph Neural Networks and Structured State Space Models

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Participants performed a simple task... We analyzed the P3 induced by the tones before self-reports of MW using a state–space model that was used for analysis to detect changes over time. The results revealed that the mean amplitude of P3 increased significantly... We concluded that the attentional resources allocated to the main task returned, suggesting that such awareness requires a decrease in resources to task-unrelated thoughts.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Tetap EXCLUDE. Meskipun menggunakan EEG data dan 'state-space model' terdengar mirip terminologi SSM, konteksnya jelas berbeda: model ruang-keadaan di sini adalah alat analisis statistik konvensional untuk time-series ERP, bukan arsitektur deep learning sekuensial. Tidak ada implementasi deep learning sama sekali, dan tujuan studi adalah eksplorasi psikologis kognitif, bukan dekoding berbasis AI.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Jelas EXCLUDE. Ini adalah studi ERP kognitif neuroscience tentang mind-wandering yang menggunakan metode analisis statis P300. 'State-space model' yang disebutkan adalah model statistik klasik untuk mendeteksi perubahan temporal pada amplitudo ERP, BUKAN Modern SSM (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena). Tujuan studi bukan AI decoding melainkan pemahaman fisiologis/kognitif. Tidak memenuhi P (bukan untuk AI decoding) dan I (bukan Modern SSM deep learning).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Temporal changes in attentional resources consumed by mind-wandering that precede awareness: An ERP study

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Alternators are a novel family of non-Markovian dynamical models featuring two neural networks (OTN and FTN). Mamba is explicitly listed as a baseline they outperform ('often outperform strong baselines such as Mambas, neural ODEs, and diffusion models'), confirming alternators are NOT a Modern SSM variant but a competing architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: MARGINAL EXCLUDE. Meskipun paper ini menyebutkan aplikasi neuroscience ('map brain activity to physical activity') dan menggunakan data aktivitas otak, arsitektur utama yang diusulkan ('alternators') bukanlah Modern SSM. Mamba disebut sebagai baseline perbandingan, bukan sebagai komponen metode. Untuk memenuhi kriteria I, arsitektur harus Modern SSM atau hibrida dengan SSM sebagai modul utama. Alternators adalah keluarga model non-Markovian baru yang berbeda dari parameterisasi state-space kontinu. Namun, perlu verifikasi full-text apakah ada komponen SSM tersembunyi dalam OTN/FTN atau apakah neuroscience application melibatkan data EEG/fMRI dekoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini memperkenalkan arsitektur baru bernama 'alternators' yang merupakan 'non-Markovian dynamical models' berbasis dua neural network (OTN dan FTN) yang bergantian menghasilkan output di observation space dan feature space. Ini BUKAN Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Mamba justru disebutkan sebagai BASELINE ('often outperform strong baselines such as Mambas'), bukan sebagai intervensi yang diimplementasikan. Kriteria I (Intervention) tidak terpenuhi. Neuroscience hanyalah satu dari tiga aplikasi, dan paper ini bersifat metodologis arsitektur umum, bukan studi BCI terfokus.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Alternators For Sequence Modeling

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study uses brain MRI images for 'precise concurrent segmentation of hippocampus and amygdala' for 'pre-operative stereotactic surgery planning' — this is anatomical structure segmentation (medical image analysis), not decoding/predicting user intent or neurological conditions from brain activity signals. The task is fundamentally a computer vision segmentation problem.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun MRI adalah modalitas pencitraan otak, tugasnya adalah segmentasi anatomis (identifikasi struktur hipokampus dan amigdala pada citra), bukan dekoding sinyal aktivitas otak untuk klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis. Ini sebanding dengan segmentasi organ pada CT scan — tugas computer vision medis, bukan BCI. Definisi operasional secara eksplisit mengharuskan 'dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis berbasis model AI', yang tidak terpenuhi di sini. Bahkan secara liberal, paper ini berada di luar cakupan domain BCI.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini melakukan segmentasi citra MRI struktural otak (hippokampus dan amigdala) untuk perencanaan bedah stereotaktik — ini adalah tugas computer vision/medical image segmentation, BUKAN dekoding/prediksi aktivitas otak atau niat pengguna berbasis sinyal BCI. Data yang digunakan (MRI struktural) bukan 'data biologis aktivitas otak' dalam konteks BCI (EEG/fMRI-fungsional/ECoG/spiking). Selain itu, Mamba digunakan sebagai 'residual structure within the convolutional network backbone', bukan sebagai backbone utama untuk pemodelan sekuensial/dependensi temporal. EXCLUDE pada Q2 (P-NOMATCH) dan juga bermasalah pada Q4 (peran Mamba bukan backbone utama).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Mamba-enhanced hierarchical attention network for precise visualization of hippocampus and amygdala

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The Bi-Mamba module then applies forward and backward state-space modeling to the temporal and spatial embeddings, fusing them at the sequence level and enabling efficient bidirectional spatiotemporal interactions rather than simply concatenating the features.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Perspektif liberal: Bi-Mamba adalah varian Modern SSM (Mamba) yang digunakan untuk pemodelan ruang keadaan bidirectional pada level sekuens, yang kritis untuk fusi spatiotemporal dan berkontribusi pada metrik akurasi tinggi, memenuhi kriteria sebagai modul utama untuk dependensi temporal.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Perspektif strict: Bi-Mamba mungkin hanya modul fusi untuk integrasi spatiotemporal, bukan backbone utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal; MTFL branch menggunakan transformer encoder untuk temporal modeling. Perlu verifikasi melalui full-text apakah Bi-Mamba adalah komponen sekuensial utama atau sekunder.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A dual-branch multiscale model based on Bi-Mamba for EEG emotion recognition

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: © 2020, Springer-Verlag London Ltd., part of Springer Nature. We have designed and developed electrooculogram-based wheelchair control... The convolution neural network to verify the performance and recognition accuracy...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Even with a liberal interpretation, three independent and decisive criteria are violated. EOG is not a brain signal regardless of classification leniency. CNN is universally excluded as it lacks any SSM component. The 2020 publication date is firmly before the 2021 S4-era cutoff. No ambiguity exists to warrant UNCERTAIN.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Multiple fatal criteria violations: (1) Publication date is 2020 (DATE-NOMATCH — before 2021 cutoff); (2) The biosignal used is electrooculogram (EOG), which is a peripheral eye-movement signal, NOT brain activity (P-NOMATCH); (3) The architecture is a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), which is explicitly excluded under intervention criteria — no Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) is present (I-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Brain–computer interface for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis patients using deep learning network

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: we generate multi-day cortisol profile data for ten subjects; we infer one's cognitive energy-related state using wearable devices rather than monitoring the brain activity directly; we employ a state-space model... to relate an internal hidden cognitive energy state to one's cortisol secretion patterns; we use Bayesian filtering.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Meskipun judul menyebut 'brain machine interface' dan ada penggunaan state-space model, secara eksplisit paper menyatakan inferensi cognitive energy state dilakukan dari wearable devices tanpa monitoring aktivitas otak langsung. Data yang digunakan adalah cortisol profile data (hormon), bukan sinyal otak. State-Space Model di sini adalah model statistik klasik untuk hidden state estimation, bukan Modern SSM yang termasuk dalam kriteria intervensi. Tetap P-NOMATCH karena tidak ada data aktivitas otak.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini menggunakan data profil kortisol (data hormon perifer) yang di-generate secara simulasi untuk 10 subjek, bukan data aktivitas otak (EEG/fMRI/fNIRS/ECoG/spiking). Secara eksplisit dinyatakan 'using wearable devices rather than monitoring the brain activity directly'. State-Space Model yang digunakan adalah SSM klasik (Bayesian filtering untuk hidden state estimation dari data hormonal), bukan Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, dll.) sebagai arsitektur deep learning. P-NOMATCH untuk keduanya (P dan I).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Closed-Loop Fuzzy Energy Regulation in Patients With Hypercortisolism via Inhibitory and Excitatory Intermittent Actuation

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract explicitly states the paper is about 'Medical image segmentation' across polyp, lung, breast, and brain MRI datasets, focusing on segmentation performance metrics (mDice, mIoU) rather than decoding brain activity.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE - Domain mismatch: Although it uses MRI data, the task is image segmentation, not decoding neural states or intent as strictly defined in the protocol (P-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE - Domain mismatch: The paper focuses on medical image segmentation (Computer Vision task) rather than decoding brain activity (BCI task) for user intent or neurological conditions.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: ÆMMamba: An Efficient Medical Segmentation Model With Edge Enhancement

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract states: 'accurate phase estimation is achieved by proper Kalman filter-based state-space modeling of brain rhythm.'
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. While the paper uses state-space modeling, the abstract specifically identifies the method as a 'Kalman filter'. The briefing strictly excludes 'Kalman Filter konvensional' and 'State-Space Model Klasik' in favor of 'Modern SSM' (Mamba, S4, etc.).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper explicitly implements a 'Kalman filter-based state-space modeling' (State-Space Model Klasik), which is explicitly excluded in the briefing as 'Kalman Filter konvensional' and 'State-Space Model Klasik'. It does not use Modern SSM architectures like Mamba, S4, H3, or Hyena.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Hardware Powered Ultra Low Latency (HarPULL) Brain-State Dependent TMS Technology

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: MI-DGHCL introduces a Mamba-based feature extractor, incorporating slice feature embedding and slice-aware scanning modules... Comprehensive experiments on 3 MI-EEG datasets demonstrate MI-DGHCL yields superior results.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE karena abstrak secara eksplisit menyebutkan 'Mamba-based feature extractor' untuk EEG decoding, yang merupakan implementasi Modern SSM (Mamba) sebagai komponen utama pemrosesan sinyal, serta dilaporkan dengan metrik kuantitatif.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE karena abstrak menyebutkan 'Mamba-based feature extractor' tetapi tidak secara eksplisit menyatakan bahwa Mamba adalah backbone utama atau modul utama untuk pemodelan sekuensial, sehingga bisa jadi hanya lapisan kecil atau komponen spesifik di dalam arsitektur yang lebih besar.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MI-DGHCL: Motor imagery EEG domain generalization via hyperbolic contrastive learning

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The study focuses on genetic variants (KCNQ2) and clinical phenotypes using next-generation sequencing, not brain activity signals (EEG/fMRI) for AI-based decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. While it uses an in-house pipeline for genetic analysis, the study focuses on clinical genetics and phenotype-genotype correlation, not AI-based decoding of brain signals.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. This is a clinical genetics study analyzing genetic variants (KCNQ2) and clinical phenotypes, not an AI study using brain activity signals (EEG/fMRI) for decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Clinical Study of 30 Novel KCNQ2 Variants/Deletions in KCNQ2-Related Disorders

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: TVGNet's core innovation is a Mamba-driven Time-Varying Feature Graph Convolution (TVFGC) module... Experiments... demonstrate that TVGNet outperforms state-of-the-art methods...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Artikel ini secara eksplisit menggunakan 'Mamba-driven Time-Varying Feature Graph Convolution (TVFGC) module' sebagai inovasi inti. Mamba adalah arsitektur Modern SSM. Dalam konteks hybrid, jika Mamba 'menggerakkan' (driven) modul konvolusi grafik, ini menunjukkan peran Mamba sebagai komponen utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal (time-varying), sehingga layak di-INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Meskipun menyebutkan 'Mamba-driven module', frasa ini bisa diartikan sebagai Mamba hanya sebagai komponen kecil yang menghasilkan fitur untuk Graph Convolution, bukan sebagai backbone utama. Jika Graph Convolution adalah fokus utama, maka Mamba hanya berperan sebagai regularizer atau komponen kecil, yang seharusnya di-EXCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: TVGNet: A novel hybrid EEG motor imagery decoding network

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: we propose the Hierarchical Spatial-Frequency Bi-Patch Mamba (HSF-BPM) network — a novel framework to adapt Mamba's state-space modeling for 2D EEG spatial pattern analysis; the pivotal role of the Mamba network within the architecture.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: 自由视角下，研究完全符合标准：EEG数据用于情绪识别（P），实施深度学习架构以Mamba为主要组件（I），报告定量性能（O），且为2025年原创研究（S）。无歧义，应INCLUDE。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 严格视角下，标题和抽象明确表明研究使用EEG数据进行情绪识别，属于脑活动数据用于AI解码。架构基于Mamba网络作为核心模块进行空间建模，属于现代SSM作为主干。实验报告state-of-the-art performance，暗示有定量指标。所有操作定义均满足，因此即使严格审查，也应INCLUDE。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: From local to global: A hierarchical spatial-frequency Bi-patch Mamba network for EEG-based emotion recognition

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The title explicitly states 'without electroencephalography'. The abstract describes signals used as 'chest electrocardiography, triaxial accelerometry, chest temperature, and finger photoplethysmography and finger temperature' — all peripheral non-brain signals. No brain activity data (EEG/fMRI/fNIRS/ECoG/spiking) is used.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE — P-NOMATCH. Bahkan dengan interpretasi paling liberal, tidak ada argumen untuk memasukkan paper ini. Sinyal ECG, PPG, akselerometri, dan suhu adalah sinyal periferal murni — bukan data aktivitas otak. Operasional definition sangat jelas: 'WHAT DOESN'T: Sinyal periferal non-otak murni'. Paper ini bahkan secara sadar dan sengaja mengecualikan EEG dari desain studinya (bukan karena keterbatasan, melainkan karena tujuan riset). Mendeklasifikasi sleep staging dari sinyal non-otak adalah domain yang menarik tetapi berada di luar cakupan SLR ini.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE — P-NOMATCH. Paper secara eksplisit menyatakan 'without electroencephalography' pada judul. Semua sinyal yang digunakan adalah sinyal periferal non-otak: ECG (kardiak), akselerometri (gerakan), PPG (vaskular perifer), suhu dada, suhu jari. Operasional definition secara eksplisit mencantumkan ECG dalam kategori 'WHAT DOESN'T: Sinyal periferal non-otak murni (EMG, ECG, EOG)'. Meskipun Mamba digunakan sebagai backbone (memenuhi I), populasi data sama sekali bukan aktivitas otak.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Mamba-based deep learning approach for sleep staging on a wireless multimodal wearable system without electroencephalography

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The dynamic constraint is obtained by using a large-scale deep neural network to approximate the dynamics of the state evolution in a discrete large-scale state-space model... evaluated over two models of 2004 and 10,016 states... related to an electroencephalographic problem for EEG generation... static and dynamic Tikhonov approaches with simplified dynamic constraints. The 'state-space model' is clearly a classical mathematical formulation for EEG inverse problem (Tikhonov regularization), and DNN serves as a dynamics approximator within this classical framework — matching the exclusion category 'DNN yang meniru SSM klasik (bukan arsitektur modern SSM)'. Additionally, the application is EEG source localization (inverse problem), not decoding/prediction/classification of user intent or neurological conditions.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Bisa dipertimbangkan karena: (1) menggunakan data EEG (P), (2) melibatkan deep neural network dan state-space model (I), (3) ada komparasi kuantitatif antar pendekatan (O). Namun bahkan secara liberal, 'state-space model' di sini merujuk pada formulasi matematis klasik untuk inverse problem (Tikhonov), bukan arsitektur Modern SSM seperti Mamba/S4. Penggunaan DNN hanya sebagai constraint/approximator dinamika dalam framework klasik, bukan sebagai backbone sekuensial. P-target pun adalah EEG source imaging, bukan BCI decoding.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: CLEAR EXCLUDE — Paper ini menggunakan 'state-space model' dalam konteks model matematis klasik untuk masalah invers EEG (Tikhonov regularization), bukan arsitektur Modern SSM (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena). DNN digunakan sebagai aproksimator dinamika dalam framework state-space klasik, yang termasuk kategori 'DNN yang meniru SSM klasik' → EXCLUDE (I-NOMATCH). Selain itu, masalah yang diselesaikan adalah EEG source localization/inverse problem, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis → EXCLUDE (P-NOMATCH).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Dynamic Tikhonov State Forecasting Based on Large-Scale Deep Neural Network Constraints †

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'Recent breakthroughs in training techniques for state space models (SSMs) specifically geared toward dynamical systems (DS) reconstruction (DSR) enable to recover the underlying system including its geometrical (attractor) and long-term statistical invariants from even short time series' — tujuan utama adalah DSR, bukan dekoding/klasifikasi BCI. Istilah 'SSM' tidak spesifik menyebut Modern SSM (S4/Mamba/H3). 'Prominent examples are the BOLD signal in fMRI' — menggunakan data otak tetapi untuk rekonstruksi dinamika generatif.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: UNCERTAIN. Paper menggunakan data fMRI BOLD (aktivitas otak) dan membahas 'state space models (SSMs)' dengan 'recent breakthroughs in training techniques' yang bisa jadi merujuk pada Modern SSM generasi baru. Frasa 'scales exceptionally well with model dimensionality and filter length' mengisyaratkan arsitektur modern yang efisien. Jika 'SSM' di sini merujuk pada S4 atau varian modernnya, dan jika 'reconstructing dynamical systems' dapat diinterpretasikan sebagai prediksi/karakterisasi kondisi otak (inferring inter-individual differences in brain dynamics), maka bisa INCLUDE. Perlu full-text untuk verifikasi: (1) apakah SSM yang digunakan adalah arsitektur Modern SSM (S4, Mamba, dll.) atau SSM klasik dengan teknik training baru, (2) apakah ada metrik kuantitatif evaluasi model.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Paper ini berfokus pada 'dynamical system reconstruction' (DSR) — yaitu merekonstruksi dinamika generatif dari data fMRI BOLD — bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi niat pengguna atau kondisi neurologis. Tujuan utamanya adalah system identification dari dinamika otak (attractor geometry, long-term statistical invariants), bukan output model AI untuk BCI atau diagnosis. Mengenai arsitektur, istilah 'state space models (SSMs)' di sini merujuk pada SSM dalam konteks teori sistem dinamis dengan teknik training control-theoretic (teacher forcing), bukan secara eksplisit Modern SSM seperti S4/Mamba/H3/Hyena. EXCLUDE di Q2 (P-NOMATCH: bukan tujuan dekoding/klasifikasi berbasis AI) atau Q4 (I-NOMATCH: kemungkinan SSM klasik, bukan Modern SSM).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A scalable generative model for dynamical system reconstruction from neuroimaging data

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Judul: 'Mamba NeuroDynamics Integration Net'; abstrak: 'Utilizes a state-space model to fit the slow-varying dynamics of HbO/HbR...' dan 'The model achieved excellent decoding across mental arithmetic (88.11%), word generation (78.24%), and motor imagery (81.07%) tasks.'
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE karena judul secara eksplisit menyebut 'Mamba' dan model menggunakan state-space model untuk pemodelan temporal, yang kemungkinan besar adalah Mamba. Metode ini memenuhi P (data fNIRS untuk decoding otak), I (arsitektur hibrida dengan komponen SSM utama), O (laporkan akurasi decoding), dan S (riset orisinal setelah 2021).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE karena dari abstrak tidak eksplisit disebutkan bahwa state-space model yang digunakan adalah Modern SSM (Mamba); hanya disebutkan 'state-space model' yang bisa merujuk pada SSM klasik. Komponen multi-head attention (Transformer-like) mungkin lebih dominan, sehingga tidak memenuhi kriteria I (Modern SSM sebagai backbone utama).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Mamba NeuroDynamics Integration Net:A cross-task highly generalizable fNIRS-based brain decoding framework

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Paper ini membandingkan Mamba, RWKV, GRU, dan Transformer untuk decoding NHP. Mamba ditemukan memiliki performa inferensi dan kalibrasi yang superior dibandingkan GRU dan Transformer.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Perspektif LIBERAL: Paper ini secara eksplisit menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) untuk decoding data NHP. Paper ini adalah benchmark study yang membandingkan performa berbagai arsitektur. Paper ini jelas memenuhi kriteria P (NHP data), I (Mamba sebagai backbone), O (metrik decoding dan speed), dan S (riset orisinal 2025).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Perspektif STRICT: Meskipun paper ini membandingkan Mamba dengan RWKV dan Transformer, paper ini adalah benchmark study. Mamba adalah Modern SSM. Paper ini memenuhi kriteria I karena mengimplementasikan Mamba sebagai backbone untuk decoding NHP. RWKV hanya adalah baseline lain.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Benchmarking Neural Decoding Backbones Towards Enhanced On-Edge iBCI Applications

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract explicitly states that 'parallel Mamba modules model long-range temporal dependencies' and reports quantitative performance metrics (classification accuracy, ITR). The architecture is a hybrid utilizing Mamba for temporal modeling.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: INCLUDE
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A Multi-Branch Deep Learning Architecture Combining GCN, Vision Transformer, and Mamba for SSVEP Signal Decoding

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Abstract menyebutkan 'leveraging the Mamba state space architecture' dan 'incorporating spatial and temporal Mamba encoders' untuk EEG-based MI classification, serta klaim 'superiority over existing models' pada BCI Competition IV datasets.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Perspektif Liberal: Abstract secara eksplisit menyebutkan 'Mamba state space architecture' dan 'Mamba encoders' sebagai inti arsitektur (I). Menggunakan istilah 'superiority over existing models' pada dataset standar (BCI Competition IV) mengimplikasikan laporan metrik kuantitatif. Memenuhi kriteria P (EEG), I (Modern SSM), dan O (implikasi metrik).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Perspektif Strict: Abstract tidak secara eksplisit menyebutkan angka metrik kuantitatif (misalnya persentase akurasi atau AUC). Istilah 'superiority' bersifat kualitatif. Tanpa angka spesifik di abstrak, kriteria Outcome (O) tidak terpenuhi secara ketat.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Spatial-Temporal Mamba Network for EEG-Based Motor Imagery Classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes the use of 'energy landscape technique' and 'disconnectivity graphs' to compare healthy controls and patients, but does not mention deep learning, neural networks, or Modern SSM architectures (Mamba, S4, etc.).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The abstract makes no mention of deep learning, neural networks, or SSM architectures. The methodology focuses on energy calculations and heat maps for group comparison, which are statistical approaches, not AI model implementations.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The study employs statistical/physiological analysis methods (energy landscape technique, disconnectivity graphs) on fMRI data, rather than implementing deep learning architectures or Modern SSMs (Mamba, S4, etc.).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Flexible Energy Landscape Analysis of Full Brain Functional Connectivity through Region Bundling

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Methods: ... Feed Forward Neural Network trained with Bat optimization algorithm (FFNNBOA).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The paper implements a standard Feed Forward Neural Network (FFNN) and does not utilize any Modern SSM architecture (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) as the backbone or main temporal module.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The paper uses a Feed Forward Neural Network (FFNN) with FFT and Bat optimization, which is a standard Deep Learning architecture, not a Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, etc.) as required by the protocol.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Cerebral palsy-affected individuals' brain-computer interface for wheelchair movement in an indoor environment using mental tasks

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract discusses 'underwater image enhancement' and 'color distortion' in images, not brain signals like EEG or fMRI.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The intervention targets image processing (underwater enhancement) rather than decoding brain activity (EEG/fMRI). There is no overlap with the target population (brain data for decoding).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The paper focuses on underwater image enhancement using computer vision techniques, not brain signal decoding or neuroimaging analysis. It fails the Population (P) criterion immediately.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: A hybrid Mamba and sparse Look-Up Table network for perceptual-friendly underwater image enhancement

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: proposes a driver drowsiness detection system, DrowzEE-G-Mamba... integration of convolutional layers and SSMs facilitates comprehensive analysis... capturing both local features and long-range dependencies
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: The title explicitly names 'Mamba' and the abstract mentions 'State Space Models (SSMs)' and 'integration... facilitating comprehensive analysis'. The mention of capturing 'long-range dependencies' suggests SSM is the core temporal component.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The abstract mentions 'integration of convolutional layers and SSMs' without explicitly stating Mamba is the backbone. It could be a hybrid where SSM is a feature extractor or auxiliary module, which might fall under exclusion criteria for 'small layers/regularizers'.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: DrowzEE-G-Mamba: Leveraging EEG and State Space Models for Driver Drowsiness Detection

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract explicitly mentions 'Stochastic subspace identification (SSID)' and proposes 'Advanced Mean Square Eigenvalue Error (AMSEE) Minimization' as the new method, identifying it as a classical state-space technique rather than a Modern SSM (Mamba/S4).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. While the paper uses EEG data, the intervention is SSID, a classical signal processing/control theory technique, not a Deep Learning architecture or Modern SSM.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The paper proposes improvements to Stochastic Subspace Identification (SSID), which is a classical state-space method (related to Kalman filtering), not a Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) as defined in the briefing. The briefing explicitly excludes 'State-Space Model Klasik (Kalman Filter tradisional...)'
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Reliable truncation parameter selection and model order estimation for stochastic subspace identification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The Mamba module, combined with the Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN), is used to update node feature states adaptively, enhancing the spatiotemporal representations of brain nodes. AGIIBM outperforms state-of-the-art models in classification accuracy, computational efficiency.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Clearly implements Modern SSM (Mamba) as part of the framework for brain network classification, with quantitative metrics on EEG/fMRI datasets, fitting all criteria for INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The architecture uses Mamba combined with GIN, but abstract indicates Mamba is specifically for updating node feature states and enhancing spatiotemporal representations, suggesting it is a key component for temporal modeling. Thus, likely INCLUDE, but caution if Mamba's role is not core.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Multi-view brain network classification based on Adaptive Graph Isomorphic Information Bottleneck Mamba

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: This study aims to develop stimulating parameters and establish normative values for S2, S3, and S4 sacral dermatomes in healthy adult populations, used as diagnostic tools to evaluate sacral nerve lesions.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Even with a liberal interpretation, the abstract shows no evidence of AI, deep learning, or modern SSM usage; the study is purely clinical neurophysiology for diagnostic purposes, so EXCLUDE remains appropriate.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE because the study does not involve AI-based decoding, prediction, or classification; it is focused on establishing normative clinical parameters for evoked potentials without any deep learning or AI model implementation.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: S2, S3, and S4 Sacral Dermatomal Evoked Potentials: Technical Parameters and Normative Values

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: This study introduces an algorithm specifically designed for processing unprocessed 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG) data, with the primary aim of detecting cardiac abnormalities. The model underwent testing specifically on the lead II ECG signal.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE — Meskipun model menggunakan arsitektur S4D (Modern SSM) sebagai backbone utama yang memenuhi criteria I, dan melaporkan metrik kuantitatif (F1-score 81.2%, AUROC 95.5%) yang memenuhi criteria O, domain aplikasi tetap ECG/cardiac bukan neuroimaging/brain activity. Tidak ada fleksibilitas interpretasi untuk memasukkan sinyal jantung ke dalam definisi 'data biologis aktivitas otak'.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE — Data yang digunakan adalah 12-lead ECG (elektrokardiogram), yaitu sinyal jantung periferal, BUKAN data aktivitas otak (EEG/fMRI/fNIRS/ECoG/spiking). Secara eksplisit tercantum dalam definisi operasional bahwa sinyal periferal non-otak seperti ECG termasuk dalam kriteria 'WHAT DOESN'T'. Meskipun menggunakan S4D (Modern SSM) sebagai backbone, criteria P tidak terpenuhi sama sekali.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: S4D-ECG: A Shallow State-of-the-Art Model for Cardiac Abnormality Classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose DHCM-CACL, a novel self-supervised emotion recognition framework integrating EEG and facial expressions... propose a Dynamic Hierarchical Cross-modal Mamba module (DHCM), which models long-term dependencies through dynamic state matrices... Experimental results on the DEAP and MAHNOB-HCI datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in emotion classification.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper jelas memenuhi semua kriteria: (P) menggunakan EEG dari dataset DEAP dan MAHNOB-HCI untuk klasifikasi emosi berbasis AI; (I) Mamba diimplementasikan sebagai komponen utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal sekuensial ('models long-term dependencies through dynamic state matrices'); (O) melaporkan performa kuantitatif SOTA pada emotion classification; (S) original research dari AAAI 2026, bahasa Inggris. Ini mirip dengan Anchor 6 (Zhou et al.) di mana Mamba sebagai blok temporal modeling pada EEG → INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Mamba digunakan sebagai modul (DHCM) dalam framework multi-tahap (pre-training + fine-tuning), bukan sebagai satu-satunya backbone. Namun, peran Mamba di sini sangat dominan: DHCM adalah modul utama yang 'models long-term dependencies through dynamic state matrices' dan melakukan 'cross-modal temporal alignment'. Ini bukan Mamba sebagai lapisan kecil/regularizer. Stuktur framework (pre-training DHCM + CACL, lalu fine-tuning dengan cross-modal attention) mengindikasikan Mamba sebagai komponen inti pemodelan temporal. Metrik kuantitatif jelas dilaporkan (SOTA emotion classification). P, I, O, S semua terpenuhi.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: DHCM-CACL: Dynamic Hierarchical Cross-modal Mamba with Confidence-Adaptive Contrastive Learning for Multimodal Emotion Recognition

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Abstract explicitly states the approach is based on 'electromyogram (EMG) and electrooculogram (EOG) data' and uses a 'Bi-LSTM network'.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Exclude. The study uses EMG and EOG data for sleep disorder classification, which falls under peripheral signals (not brain activity) according to the P criteria. The model is Bi-LSTM, which is excluded under the I criteria as it is not a Modern SSM.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Exclude. The paper utilizes EMG and EOG signals (peripheral signals) rather than brain activity (EEG/fMRI), and employs a Bi-LSTM network (standard RNN) rather than Modern SSM architectures (Mamba, S4, etc.).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Automated Sleep Disorder Diagnosis Utilising EMG & EOG with Bi-LSTM Model and a Novel Reconfigurable Filter bank

reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. The methodology relies on Classical Machine Learning and hand-crafted features. The mention of 'state-space modeling' in the conclusion refers to the conceptual states found by clustering, not the Deep Learning architecture class defined in the briefing.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The study employs Classical Machine Learning (Boosting, Clustering) and hand-crafted features (wavelet decomposition), not Deep Learning or Modern SSM architectures.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract describes using 'Linear Matrix Inequality solutions' and a 'Lipschitz Non-linear model-based Observer' to estimate states, which is a mathematical estimation technique rather than a Deep Learning architecture.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Its fully convolutional architecture preserves complete temporal information
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: UNCERTAIN. Judul 'dual-layer state space net' mungkin mengimplikasikan model state-space modern, namun abstract secara eksplisit mendeskripsikan arsitektur 'fully convolutional'. Kontradiksi ini memerlukan verifikasi full-text untuk menentukan apakah 'state space' di sini merujuk pada arsitektur Modern SSM (seperti SSM kontinu) atau hanya terminologi untuk representasi neural state tanpa parameterisasi ruang keadaan kontinu.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. Abstract secara eksplisit menyebut 'fully convolutional architecture' sebagai fondasi DLSSNet, tanpa penyebutan atau implikasi arsitektur Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Meskipun judul mengandung 'state space net', penjelasan arsitektur di abstract mengindikasikan ini bukan arsitektur Modern SSM sesuai definisi operasional.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Interpretable dual-layer state space net for capturing fine-grained temporal features in EEG-based motor imagery BCIs

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Experimental results on the SEED, SEED-IV, and SEED-V datasets demonstrate that our method significantly surpasses current state-of-the-art methods.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Paper secara eksplisit menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) sebagai backbone utama untuk pemodelan temporal dalam multimodal emotion recognition dengan data EEG, dan menyebutkan hasil eksperimental yang lebih baik dari SOTA, yang mengimplikasikan adanya metrik kuantitatif. Sangat mungkin memenuhi semua kriteria.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Meskipun menggunakan Mamba sebagai komponen utama untuk EEG, abstrak tidak menyebutkan metrik kuantitatif spesifik (seperti akurasi, AUC) yang dibutuhkan untuk Outcome. Perlu verifikasi full-text untuk memastikan evaluasi numerik yang memadai.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: MambaMER: Adaptive EEG-Guided Multimodal Emotion Recognition with Mamba

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Mamba-based multi-scale dynamic graph learning module for extracting spatio-temporal dynamic features from fMRI time series; accuracy and area under the curve reached 73.9% and 74.9%, respectively.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: 直接使用Mamba（现代SSM）作为多尺度动态图学习模块的核心，处理fMRI时间序列以提取时空特征，并报告了准确率和AUC等量化指标，完全符合P、I、O、S标准。
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: 虽然抽象中明确提到'Mamba-based'模块用于时间特征提取，但在严格审查下，可能会质疑Mamba是否确实是主干架构还是只是辅助组件。然而，从描述看，它似乎是核心模块，因此倾向于包含，但建议审阅全文以确认其作用。
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Multi-task dynamic graph learning for brain disorder identification with functional MRI

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: To observe the effects of electroacupuncture (EA) on sleep electroencephalogram (EEG) and event-related potential (ERP) in patients with somatoform disorders — studi ini adalah observasi klinis murni terhadap parameter fisiologis EEG/ERP tanpa implementasi model AI apapun untuk dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Bahkan dengan interpretasi paling liberal, tidak ada satu pun elemen AI/ML dalam studi ini. EEG dan ERP hanya digunakan sebagai biomarker klinis untuk menilai respons terhadap akupunktur. Tidak ada model prediktif, tidak ada dekoding niat pengguna, tidak ada klasifikasi berbasis neural network. Tetap EXCLUDE di Q2.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Studi ini adalah uji klinis akupunktur elektro yang menggunakan EEG tidur dan ERP (MMN, P300) semata-mata sebagai ukuran outcome fisiologis untuk mengobservasi efek terapi akupunktur pada pasien somatoform disorder. Tidak ada model AI, deep learning, atau machine learning apapun yang diimplementasikan. Analisis menggunakan statistik konvensional (uji t, ANOVA). Kegagalan jelas di Q2: data EEG digunakan untuk tujuan observasi klinis, bukan dekoding/prediksi/klasifikasi berbasis AI. P-NOMATCH.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Clinical study of electroacupuncture improving sleep electroencephalogram and event-related potential in patients with somatoform disorders; [电针改善躯体形式障碍患者睡眠脑电及事件相关电位的临床研究]

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: BrainMamba uses two modules: (i) A novel multivariate timeseries encoder that leverage an MLP to fuse information across variates and an Selective Structured State Space (S4) architecture to encode each timeseries.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Liberal interpretation accepts the paper as clearly using brain activity data for AI-based diagnosis, implementing Modern SSM (S4) as a core architecture for encoding timeseries, and reporting quantitative performance against baselines.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Strict perspective might question if '3 modalities' explicitly include brain data like EEG/fMRI, and whether S4 is unambiguously the main backbone for temporal modeling, but the abstract strongly suggests it meets criteria.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The model innovatively introduces an enhanced bidirectional Mamba (Bi-Mamba) module to efficiently capture non-causal long-range temporal dependencies with linear computational complexity... demonstrate that MSResBiMamba achieves outstanding classification performance in multi-class motor imagery tasks, significantly outperforming traditional methods and existing state-of-the-art neural networks.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Jelas menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) sebagai komponen utama untuk temporal modeling dalam arsitektur hybrid CNN-Mamba-MHSA. Data EEG motor imagery untuk BCI dengan metrik kuantitatif. INCLUDE.

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: Heart rate variability (HRV) analysis with partial epilepsy signals; backward Euler-based state-space model; iterative unbiased finite impulse response (I-UFIR) smoothing algorithm; methods tested by partial seizures records taken from patients during continuous electroencephalography, electrocardiography — the modeled signal is HRV (ECG-derived), a peripheral non-brain signal, and the methods are classical numerical algorithms, not modern deep learning SSM.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: EXCLUDE. Bahkan dengan interpretasi paling liberal, dua kriteria terlalu dilanggar: (1) data yang dimodelkan adalah HRV dari ECG, bukan sinyal otak — tujuannya adalah baseline estimation dan outlier detection pada HRV, bukan dekoding niat/kondisi neurologis berbasis model AI dari data otak; (2) tidak ada deep learning yang digunakan sama sekali — paper menggunakan algoritma numerik klasik (UFIR smoother, backward Euler-based state-space model, boxplot methodology, histogram quartiles). Tidak ada Modern SSM yang terlibat.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. HRV (Heart Rate Variability) adalah sinyal periferal yang berasal dari ECG, bukan data aktivitas otak. Meskipun pasien dipantau dengan EEG, sinyal yang dianalisis dan dimodelkan adalah HRV — yang secara eksplisit terdaftar dalam P-NOMATCH ('Sinyal periferal non-otak murni (EMG, ECG, EOG)'). Selain itu, 'state-space model' dan 'I-UFIR smoother' yang disebutkan adalah algoritma pemrosesan sinyal klasik (UFIR = Unbiased Finite Impulse Response), bukan arsitektur Modern SSM deep learning (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena). Ini adalah SSM Klasik yang secara eksplisit masuk dalam daftar EXCLUDE kriteria I.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Outliers detection for accurate HRV-seizure baseline estimation using modern numerical algorithms

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: This paper introduces an efficient deep learning model for classifying brain electrical signals based on a Mamba structure enhanced with split-based pyramidal convolution (PySPConv) and Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN)-channel-spatial attention (KSA) mechanisms. ... The model achieves a 96.76% accuracy on the eegmmidb dataset ...
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Perspektif LIBERAL: Paper secara eksplisit menyatakan model berbasis pada 'Mamba structure' yang ditingkatkan dengan PySPConv dan KSA untuk klasifikasi EEG (P matched). Mamba adalah arsitektur Modern SSM. Model ini melaporkan metrik kuantitatif (akurasi 96.76%) pada dataset EEG standar (O matched). Walaupun arsitektur hibrida, frasa 'based on a Mamba structure' dan 'reinforce feature extraction at each layer in Mamba’s structure' mengindikasikan Mamba sebagai komponen inti untuk pemodelan sekuensial. Riset orisinal, bahasa Inggris, tahun 2025 (S matched). INCLUDE jelas.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Perspektif STRICT: Paper ini jelas menggunakan data EEG untuk klasifikasi BCI (P matched) dan melaporkan metrik kuantitatif akurasi 96.76% (O matched). Namun, judul dan abstrak menunjukkan arsitektur 'Mamba with split-based pyramidal convolution and Kolmogorov-Arnold network-channel-spatial attention', yang mengimplikasikan Mamba sebagai komponen inti, tetapi deskripsi 'enhanced with' dan 'integration allows the model to reinforce feature extraction at each layer in Mamba’s structure' agak ambigu mengenai apakah Mamba benar-benar backbone sekuensial utuh atau hanya dimodifikasi berat. Abstrak tidak memberikan detail eksplisit tentang peran Mamba dalam pemodelan dependensi temporal dibandingkan modul lain. Walaupun demikian, secara eksplisit disebutkan 'based on a Mamba structure', sehingga kecenderungan adalah INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Mamba with split-based pyramidal convolution and Kolmogorov-Arnold network-channel-spatial attention for electroencephalogram classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: 'lightweight Mamba-based architecture, PhysioMamba, engineered to efficiently capture long-range dynamics in ECG waveforms' - Mamba digunakan untuk ECG (perifer), sementara EEG diproses oleh MRFC (bukan SSM). Tidak jelas apakah PhysioMamba adalah 'modul utama untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal/sekuensial' keseluruhan atau hanya komponen ringan sampingan, mengingat label 'lightweight' dan penggunaan hanya untuk satu modalitas.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: PhysioMamba jelas menggunakan Mamba (Modern SSM) untuk 'efficiently capture long-range dynamics' pada sinyal fisiologis - ini adalah use case klasik SSM. Framework hybrid ini menggunakan EEG (data otak) dengan metrik kuantitatif jelas (MAE=1.7609, MSE=4.4916). Mamba berperan sebagai komponen arsitektural untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal, bukan sekadar regularizer. Kecenderungan INCLUDE.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: PhysioMamba dijelaskan sebagai 'lightweight Mamba-based architecture' yang hanya menangani ECG waveform (sinyal perifer jantung, bukan otak), sedangkan EEG diproses oleh MRFC (parameter-free, bukan SSM). Mamba hanya menjadi komponen ringan untuk satu modalitas perifer, bukan backbone utama keseluruhan framework. Kecenderungan EXCLUDE karena peran Mamba tidak cukup dominan dan diterapkan pada sinyal non-otak.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: HCF-Net: A Hierarchical Co-evolutionary Fusion Network for continuous affective state estimation from synergistic EEG-cardiac dynamics

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: By adding Mamba, temporal features in time sequence signals are better extracted. Experimental results show that Mamba enhances decoding performance in the within-trial setting with fewer parameters and demonstrates strong generalization in the cross-trial setting.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Jelas INCLUDE. Framework secara eksplisit bernama M-DBPNet berbasis Mamba, Mamba menjadi komponen utama untuk pemodelan temporal (sequential dependency) pada EEG. Menggunakan data EEG untuk dekoding perhatian auditori (P), Modern SSM (Mamba) sebagai komponen inti temporal (I), melaporkan kinerja dekoding kuantitatif dan efisiensi parameter (O), riset orisinal 2025 (S).
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: Mamba digunakan dalam arsitektur 'dual branch parallel' (M-DBPNet) di mana Mamba menangani ekstraksi fitur temporal sementara branch lain menangani domain frekuensi. Frasa 'by adding Mamba' bisa mengimplikasikan Mamba sebagai modul tambahan, bukan backbone utuh. Namun, arsitektur dinamai 'Mamba-based' dan Mamba berperan eksplisit untuk pemodelan dependensi temporal pada sinyal sekuensial EEG — ini konsisten dengan Anchor 6 (Zhou et al. 2025, CNN+Mamba dengan Mamba sebagai blok temporal utama). Masih memenuhi kriteria I.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Seeing helps hearing: A multi-modal dataset and a mamba-based dual branch parallel network for auditory attention decoding

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We develop a Transformer-Mamba module to extract global dependencies and accelerate training... The comparative studies demonstrate that the Transformer-Mamba design outperforms traditional Transformer architecture in terms of decoding accuracy, stability and training speed. (Quantitative metrics: BCICIV-2a: 82.9%, BCICIV-2b: 87.81%)
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: Clear hybrid Transformer-Mamba architecture where Mamba is a core component for temporal modeling. The paper states 'this is the first attempt to combine the Mamba and Transformer architectures in EEG decoding,' making the Mamba integration a primary design contribution. Quantitative accuracy metrics are extensively reported across two benchmark datasets (BCICIV-2a, BCICIV-2b) in both subject-dependent and subject-independent settings. Training speed improvements are also noted. All PICO criteria are unambiguously met.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The abstract explicitly describes a 'Transformer-Mamba module' as a core architectural component, not a minor add-on. However, one could argue that without full-text, it's unclear whether Mamba is truly a 'main' sequential backbone or if Transformer dominates and Mamba is a smaller supplement. The phrase 'accelerate training' could suggest Mamba plays an efficiency role rather than a primary modeling role. Nonetheless, the paper's central contribution is the hybrid design and comparative results show it outperforms 'traditional Transformer architecture,' implying Mamba is substantively integrated.
reviewer1_perspectives.title: FA-STTM: A hybrid Transformer-Mamba network for motor imagery EEG classification

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: We propose a new model, namely, the heterogeneous input discriminative-generative decoder (HI-DGD) model, to infer a cognitive state underlying decision-making based on neural activities (STN and mPFC) and behavioral signals... the HI-DGD model can diffuse information from neural and behavioral data simultaneously and estimate cognitive states... significantly better than traditional methods. The model is described as a decoder for latent cognitive state estimation with no mention of deep learning, neural networks, or Modern SSM architectures (Mamba/S4/H3/Hyena).
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: UNCERTAIN. The abstract uses language like 'diffuse information from neural and behavioral data simultaneously' and 'cognitive state' estimation, which could potentially involve modern deep learning components not described in detail in the abstract. The model name 'HI-DGD' is novel and unfamiliar, so the underlying architecture cannot be fully ruled out from abstract alone. However, the framing (latent cognitive state inference, comparison to 'traditional methods,' emphasis on interpretability of neural features) strongly suggests a classical statistical/latent-variable approach rather than Modern SSM-based deep learning. Need full-text to definitively confirm no Modern SSM backbone is used.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The HI-DGD model is a 'discriminative-generative decoder' for latent cognitive state estimation—this is a classical statistical/latent-variable decoder approach, not a deep learning architecture. There is zero mention of any Modern SSM (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena), neural networks, or deep learning components. Even if this uses a state-space formulation, it falls under 'State-Space Model Klasik' (e.g., latent state inference via Bayesian/statistical methods), which is explicitly excluded. Fails at Q3 (no deep learning implementation) and Q4 (no Modern SSM).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Inferring cognitive state underlying conflict choices in verbal Stroop task using heterogeneous input discriminative-generative decoder model

reviewer1_perspectives.evidence: The abstract mentions 'switching state-space models' and 'neural oscillators' to construct a generative model for spindles, using a variational Bayes approximation for inference.
reviewer1_perspectives.liberal: It uses state-space models for temporal modeling of EEG. It's a novel approach to segmentation. Maybe the reviewer considers 'state-space' broadly? But the briefing is very specific about 'Modern SSM' vs 'Classical SSM'. 'Switching state-space' is usually associated with Hidden Markov Models (HMMs) or Bayesian filtering, not the Deep Learning S4/Mamba revolution. Even if one considers it 'State-Space', it lacks the 'Deep Learning' backbone aspect required by the briefing (which asks for 'Implementasi sistem deep learning dengan varian Modern SSM'). This paper seems to be a statistical inference paper, not a deep learning paper.
reviewer1_perspectives.strict: The paper uses a 'switching state-space model' and 'neural oscillators' for signal processing/detection. This is a statistical approach, not a Deep Learning architecture like Mamba or S4. It does not fit the 'Modern SSM' definition (Mamba, S4, H3, Hyena) nor the 'Classical SSM' exclusion criteria (it's a specific switching variant, but still not a DL backbone).
reviewer1_perspectives.title: Automatic Segmentation of Sleep Spindles: A Variational Switching State-Space Approach

reviewer1_perspectives.strict: EXCLUDE. The paper proposes DeepGraphDMD, an autoencoder-based deep learning model that learns Koopman eigenfunctions for graph data. This is a spectral decomposition method based on Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD), not a State-Space Model (SSM) like Mamba, S4, or Hyena. It falls under 'DNN approximation yang tidak berbasis arsitektur SSM modern' which is explicitly excluded.
